Text
  
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SPFXB]  
    @RefreshRanking BIT = 1   -- 1=全量刷新(重算排名/标记), 0=数据刷新(只更新销售/库存/在途)  
AS  
BEGIN  
    SET NOCOUNT ON;  
    SET ANSI_WARNINGS OFF;  
  
    DECLARE @StepTime DATETIME = GETDATE();   -- 计时起点  
  
    PRINT '===== SPFXB 开始执行 =====';  
    PRINT '开始时间: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120);  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤1：获取90天销售明细（含返货处理，只保留指定门店类型）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤1: 获取90天销售明细...';  
    SELECT mdbh, mdmc, spid, lsh, hyk,   
           CONVERT(DATE, rq_str) AS rq, shl, ssje, cbje  
    INTO #xsmx   
    FROM (  
        SELECT   
            c.rec AS mdbh,   
            c.fullname AS mdmc,   
            d.fullname AS xsy,  
            CONVERT(varchar(100), a.billdate, 112) AS rq_str,  
            e.C0 AS fl,  
            a.billcode AS lsh,   
            e.Rec AS XSPID,   
            e.USERCODE AS SPID,  
            e.fullname AS spmc,   
            e.standard AS spgg,   
            e.comment AS spcd,  
            a.vipcardid AS hyk,  
            SUM(CASE WHEN a.BillType = '152' THEN -b.total ELSE b.total END) AS ssje,  
            SUM(CASE WHEN a.BillType = '152' THEN -(b.qty * b.costprice) ELSE (b.qty * b.costprice) END) AS cbje,  
            SUM(CASE WHEN a.BillType = '152' THEN -b.qty ELSE b.qty END) AS shl  
        FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.Vbillindex a WITH (NOLOCK)  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vsalebill  b WITH (NOLOCK) ON a.billid = b.billid  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vstock     c WITH (NOLOCK) ON b.krec = c.rec  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vemployee  d WITH (NOLOCK) ON a.ERec = d.REC  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype     e WITH (NOLOCK) ON b.prec = e.rec  
        WHERE a.billdate >= CONVERT(date, DATEADD(dd, -90, GETDATE()))  
          AND c.Rec IN ('3','4','5','6','7','8','9','10','11','13','36','50','63','66')  
        GROUP BY c.rec, c.fullname, d.fullname, CONVERT(varchar(100), a.billdate, 112),  
                 a.billcode, e.Rec, e.fullname, e.standard, e.comment, a.vipcardid, e.C0, a.BillType, e.USERCODE  
    ) A;  
    PRINT '步骤1完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤1 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤2：获取180天销售汇总（用于判断“一品一签”）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤2: 获取180天销售汇总...';  
    SELECT mdbh, mdmc, spid,   
           SUM(shl) AS qian180shl,   
           SUM(ssje) AS qian180ssje,   
           SUM(cbje) AS qian180cbje  
    INTO #qian180xsmx   
    FROM (  
        SELECT   
            c.rec AS mdbh,   
            c.fullname AS mdmc,  
            e.USERCODE AS SPID,  
            SUM(CASE WHEN a.BillType = '152' THEN -b.total ELSE b.total END) AS ssje,  
            SUM(CASE WHEN a.BillType = '152' THEN -(b.qty * b.costprice) ELSE (b.qty * b.costprice) END) AS cbje,  
            SUM(CASE WHEN a.BillType = '152' THEN -b.qty ELSE b.qty END) AS shl  
        FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.Vbillindex a WITH (NOLOCK)  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vsalebill  b WITH (NOLOCK) ON a.billid = b.billid  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vstock     c WITH (NOLOCK) ON b.krec = c.rec  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vemployee  d WITH (NOLOCK) ON a.ERec = d.REC  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype     e WITH (NOLOCK) ON b.prec = e.rec  
        WHERE a.billdate >= CONVERT(date, DATEADD(dd, -180, GETDATE()))  
          AND c.Rec IN ('3','4','5','6','7','8','9','10','11','13','36','50','63','66')  
        GROUP BY c.rec, c.fullname, e.USERCODE  
    ) A  
    GROUP BY mdbh, mdmc, spid;  
    PRINT '步骤2完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤2 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
    CREATE INDEX IX_qian180xsmx ON #qian180xsmx (mdbh, spid);   -- 新增  
SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  -- 重置计时  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤3：获取库存明细（门店库存 + 配送中心库存）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤3: 获取库存明细...';  
    SELECT mdbh, mdmc, spid, SUM(kcsl) AS kcsl, SUM(kcje) AS kcje  
    INTO #kcmx  
    FROM (  
        SELECT a.krec AS mdbh, c.fullname AS mdmc, b.usercode AS spid,  
               CAST(SUM(qty) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS kcsl,   
               CAST(SUM(total) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS kcje  
        FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.GoodsStocks a WITH (NOLOCK)  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype b WITH (NOLOCK) ON a.prec = b.rec  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vstock c WITH (NOLOCK) ON a.krec = c.rec  
        WHERE a.krec IN ('3','4','5','6','7','8','9','10','11','13','36','50','63','66')  
        GROUP BY a.krec, b.usercode, c.fullname  
    ) A  
    GROUP BY mdbh, mdmc, spid;  
    PRINT '步骤3完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤3 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤4：获取商品分类信息（标记、毛利率等）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤4: 获取商品分类信息...';  
    SELECT a.spid, spmc, spgg, spcd, spdw, jj, hyj, lsj, dl,  
           LEFT(bj,1) AS bj, bjmx, hmll  
    INTO #spfl  
    FROM (  
        SELECT   
            A.Rec AS XSPID, A.usercode AS SPID, A.fullname AS SPMC,  
            A.standard AS SPGG, B.FullName AS SPCD, A.UNIT1 AS SPDW,  
            A.recprice AS jj, A.retailprice AS lsj, A.vipprice AS hyj,  
            LEFT(C0,1) AS BJ, C0 AS BJMX,  
            rtrim(convert(numeric(18,2),  
                CASE WHEN a.vipprice = 0 AND A.retailprice <> 0 THEN (A.retailprice - A.recprice) / A.retailprice  
                     WHEN a.vipprice = 0 AND A.retailprice = 0 THEN 0  
                     ELSE (a.vipprice - A.recprice) / a.vipprice  
                END * 100)) + '%' AS Hmll  
        FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype A WITH (NOLOCK)  
        JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.cstype B WITH (NOLOCK) ON A.area = B.rec  
    ) a  
    LEFT JOIN (  
        SELECT spid, dl FROM (  
            SELECT LEFT(TYPEiD,5) AS lbbm, fullname AS dl  
            FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.vptype WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE leveal = '1'  
        ) a  
        LEFT JOIN (  
            SELECT LEFT(TYPEiD,5) AS lbbm, UserCode AS spid  
            FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.vptype WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE leveal = '3'  
        ) b ON a.lbbm = b.lbbm  
    ) b ON a.spid = b.spid;  
    PRINT '步骤4完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤4 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤5：汇总90天销售（按门店+商品）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤5: 汇总90天销售...';  
    SELECT MDBH, MDMC, spid,   
           SUM(shl) AS shl,   
           SUM(ssje) AS ssje,   
           SUM(cbje) AS cbje  
    INTO #xshz  
    FROM #xsmx WITH (NOLOCK)  
    GROUP BY mdmc, mdbh, spid;  
    PRINT '步骤5完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤5 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤6：合并进销存（将销售与库存合并）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤6: 合并进销存...';  
    SELECT b.mdbh, b.mdmc, a.spid, a.spmc, a.spgg, a.spcd, a.spdw, a.lsj, a.hyj, a.hmll,  
           ISNULL(A.dl, '未分类') AS dl, a.jj, a.bj, a.bjmx,  
           ISNULL(b.kcsl,0) AS kcsl, ISNULL(b.kcje,0) AS kcje,   
           ISNULL(b.shl,0) AS shl, ISNULL(b.ssje,0) AS ssje, ISNULL(b.cbje,0) AS cbje  
    INTO #jxc  
    FROM #spfl a  
    LEFT JOIN (  
        SELECT mdbh, mdmc, spid,  
               SUM(shl) AS shl, SUM(ssje) AS ssje, SUM(cbje) AS cbje,  
               SUM(kcsl) AS kcsl, SUM(kcje) AS kcje  
        FROM (  
            SELECT mdbh, mdmc, spid, shl, ssje, cbje, 0 AS kcsl, 0 AS kcje FROM #xshz  
            UNION ALL  
            SELECT mdbh, mdmc, spid, 0, 0, 0, kcsl, kcje FROM #kcmx  
        ) a   
        GROUP BY mdbh, mdmc, spid  
    ) b ON a.spid = b.spid;  
    DELETE FROM #jxc WHERE kcsl = 0 AND shl = 0;  
    PRINT '步骤6完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤6 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤7：计算客流和30天销售（用于后续排名辅助）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤7: 计算客流和30天销售...';  
      
    SELECT MDMC, SPID, COUNT(LSH) AS QJSTKL INTO #tmp_kf1  
    FROM #xsmx   
    WHERE rq >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, GETDATE()) AND rq < DATEADD(MONTH, -2, GETDATE())  
    GROUP BY MDMC, SPID;  
  
    SELECT MDMC, SPID, COUNT(LSH) AS QLSTKL INTO #tmp_kf2  
    FROM #xsmx   
    WHERE rq >= DATEADD(MONTH, -2, GETDATE()) AND rq < DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())  
    GROUP BY MDMC, SPID;  
  
    SELECT MDMC, SPID, COUNT(LSH) AS QSSTKL INTO #tmp_kf3  
    FROM #xsmx   
    WHERE rq >= DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())  
    GROUP BY MDMC, SPID;  
  
    SELECT MDMC, SPID, SUM(SSJE) AS QSSJE, SUM(CBJE) AS QCBJE, SUM(SHL) AS QSHL  
    INTO #tmp_sale30  
    FROM #xsmx   
    WHERE rq >= CONVERT(date, DATEADD(dd, -30, GETDATE()))  
    GROUP BY MDMC, SPID;  
  
    -- 配送中心库存（排除不合格药品仓库）  
    SELECT SPID, KCSL AS CKKCSL INTO #tmp_ckkc  
    FROM #kcmx WHERE mdmc LIKE '%仓库%' AND mdmc NOT LIKE '%不合格%';  
    PRINT '步骤7完成';  
    PRINT '步骤7 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
    CREATE INDEX IX_tmp_kf1 ON #tmp_kf1 (MDMC, SPID);           -- 新增  
CREATE INDEX IX_tmp_kf2 ON #tmp_kf2 (MDMC, SPID);  
CREATE INDEX IX_tmp_kf3 ON #tmp_kf3 (MDMC, SPID);  
CREATE INDEX IX_tmp_sale30 ON #tmp_sale30 (MDMC, SPID);  
CREATE INDEX IX_tmp_ckkc ON #tmp_ckkc (SPID);  
SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤8：备份手工确认值（用于后续恢复）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤8: 备份手工确认值...';  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#HandConfirmBackup') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #HandConfirmBackup  
    SELECT [门店名称], [商品编码], [标准库存数量确认]  
    INTO #HandConfirmBackup  
    FROM dbo.SPFXB_Result WITH (NOLOCK)  
    WHERE [标准库存数量确认] IS NOT NULL AND [标准库存数量确认] != 0;  
    PRINT '步骤8完成';  
    PRINT '步骤8 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤8.5：获取在途数量（调用Gp_SendDoing存储过程，正确关联收货方门店）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤8.5: 获取在途数量...';  
      
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IntransitRaw') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IntransitRaw;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IntransitFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IntransitFinal;  
  
    CREATE TABLE #IntransitRaw (  
        ord INT,  
        UniqueBillid VARCHAR(100),  
        billid INT,  
        KRec INT,  
        BillDate DATETIME,  
        BillCode VARCHAR(50),  
        BillType INT,  
        AuditingDate DATETIME,  
        BillE INT,  
        Comment VARCHAR(500),  
        explain VARCHAR(500),  
        posid INT,  
        TOBillDate DATETIME,  
        TOBillCode VARCHAR(50),  
        ToBillType INT,  
        SendType INT,  
        PRec INT,  
        Qty DECIMAL(18,4),  
        costprice DECIMAL(18,4),  
        PtypeId VARCHAR(50),  
        jobnumber VARCHAR(50),  
        ValidityPeriod DATETIME,  
        OutFactoryDate DATETIME,  
        posid02 INT,  
        PosInMustZLYS INT,  
        QualityStatus INT,  
        billName VARCHAR(100),  
        billNameT VARCHAR(100),  
        EFullName VARCHAR(100),  
        SendTypeName NVARCHAR(50),  
        PosCode VARCHAR(20),  
        PosName NVARCHAR(50)  
    );  
  
    DECLARE @StartDate DATETIME = DATEADD(DAY, -180, GETDATE());  
    DECLARE @EndDate DATETIME = GETDATE();  
  
    INSERT INTO #IntransitRaw  
    EXEC ZHYYLS.dbo.Gp_SendDoing   
        1,                          -- 配送在途  
        '', '', 0, 0, 0,   
        @StartDate, @EndDate,   
        0, 0, 0, 2;  
  
    SELECT   
        s.fullname AS 门店名称,  
        p.usercode AS 商品编码,  
        SUM(CAST(i.Qty AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS 在途数量  
    INTO #IntransitFinal  
    FROM #IntransitRaw i  
    INNER JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.vPtype p ON i.PRec = p.Rec  
    INNER JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vstock s ON i.posid = s.rec  
    WHERE i.Qty > 0  
    GROUP BY s.fullname, p.usercode;  
  
    DROP TABLE #IntransitRaw;  
    PRINT '步骤8.5完成，在途记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤8.5 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
    CREATE INDEX IX_IntransitFinal ON #IntransitFinal (门店名称, 商品编码);   -- 新增  
SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤9：构建基础数据（排除仓库类门店，添加分类组，关联在途）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤9: 构建基础数据...';  
      
    SELECT   
        A.MDMC AS 门店名称,   
        CAST(A.SPID AS VARCHAR(50)) AS 商品编码,   
        A.SPMC AS 商品名称,  
        A.SPGG AS 规格,  
        A.SPCD AS 生产企业,  
        A.spdw AS 单位,  
        A.BJ AS 标记,  
        A.BJMX AS 辅助标记,  
        A.JJ AS 最近进价,  
        A.KCSL AS 库存数量,  
        A.KCSL AS 门店库存汇总,  -- 临时值，后续更新为库存+在途  
        ISNULL(D.QJSTKL,0) AS 前90天起30天客流,  
        ISNULL(B.QLSTKL,0) AS 前60天起30天客流,  
        ISNULL(C.QSSTKL,0) AS 前30天客流,  
        ISNULL(F.CKKCSL,0) AS 配送中心库存数量,  
        ISNULL(E.QSHL,0) AS 前30天销售数量,  
        ISNULL(E.QSSJE,0) AS 前30天销售金额,  
        A.SHL AS 前90天销售数量,  
        A.SSJE AS 前90天销售金额,  
        ISNULL(K.qian180shl,0) AS 前180天销售数量,  
        ISNULL(K.qian180ssje,0) AS 前180天销售金额,  
        ROUND(CASE WHEN A.SHL=0 THEN 0 ELSE A.SHL/3 END,0) AS 月均销售数量,  
        CONVERT(varchar(100),GETDATE(),112) AS 库存日期,  
        CASE WHEN A.BJ IN ('A','B','C','D','E') THEN 'A-E类' ELSE '其他类' END AS 分类组  
    INTO #BaseData  
    FROM #jxc A  
    LEFT JOIN #tmp_kf2 B ON A.SPID = B.SPID AND A.MDMC = B.MDMC  
    LEFT JOIN #tmp_kf3 C ON A.SPID = C.SPID AND A.MDMC = C.MDMC  
    LEFT JOIN #tmp_kf1 D ON A.SPID = D.SPID AND A.MDMC = D.MDMC  
    LEFT JOIN #tmp_sale30 E ON A.SPID = E.SPID AND A.MDMC = E.MDMC  
    LEFT JOIN #tmp_ckkc F ON A.SPID = F.SPID  
    LEFT JOIN #qian180xsmx K ON A.SPID = K.SPID AND A.MDBH = K.MDBH  
    WHERE A.MDMC NOT LIKE '%损耗%'   
      AND A.MDMC <> '配送中心'  
      AND A.MDMC NOT LIKE '%仓库%'      -- 排除所有名称包含“仓库”的门店  
      AND A.BJ NOT IN ('Y', 'Z')  
      AND A.BJ IS NOT NULL   
      AND A.BJ != '';  
  
    PRINT '基础数据初始记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
  
    -- 关联在途数量  
    ALTER TABLE #BaseData ADD 在途数量 DECIMAL(18,2) DEFAULT 0;  
    UPDATE B   
    SET 在途数量 = ISNULL(I.在途数量, 0)  
    FROM #BaseData B  
    LEFT JOIN #IntransitFinal I   
        ON LTRIM(RTRIM(B.门店名称)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(I.门店名称))   
        AND CAST(B.商品编码 AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST(I.商品编码 AS VARCHAR(50));  
  
    -- 更新门店库存汇总 = 库存数量 + 在途数量  
    UPDATE #BaseData   
    SET 门店库存汇总 = ISNULL(库存数量, 0) + ISNULL(在途数量, 0);  
  
    -- 删除既无销售、无库存、也无在途的商品（有在途的保留）  
    DELETE FROM #BaseData  
    WHERE (ISNULL(前90天销售数量,0) = 0)  
      AND (ISNULL(库存数量,0) = 0)  
      AND (ISNULL(在途数量,0) = 0);  
  
    PRINT '基础数据最终记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
  
    -- 创建索引加速排名计算  
    CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX IX_BaseData_Store ON #BaseData ([门店名称], [分类组]);  
    CREATE INDEX IX_BaseData_Amt ON #BaseData ([门店名称], [分类组], [前90天销售金额] DESC);  
  
    PRINT '步骤9完成';  
    PRINT '步骤9 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤10：计算门店内排名及高效采购标记  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤10开始...';  
  
    -- 统一创建 #NewData 表（全量/增量共用，避免重复定义）  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#NewData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #NewData;  
    CREATE TABLE #NewData (  
        门店名称 NVARCHAR(100), 商品编码 VARCHAR(50), 商品名称 NVARCHAR(200), 规格 NVARCHAR(100), 生产企业 NVARCHAR(200), 单位 NVARCHAR(50),  
        标记 VARCHAR(10), 辅助标记 VARCHAR(50), 最近进价 DECIMAL(18,2), 库存数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 在途数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 门店库存汇总 DECIMAL(18,2),  
        配送中心库存数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 前180天销售数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 前90天销售数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 前30天销售数量 DECIMAL(18,2),  
        前90天销售金额 DECIMAL(18,2), 前90天销售金额排名 BIGINT, 月均销售数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 库存日期 VARCHAR(20),  
        金额版标记 VARCHAR(20), 销量版标记 VARCHAR(20),  
        高效采购标记90天_合并 VARCHAR(20), 高效采购库存倍数 DECIMAL(18,2), 标准库存数量 DECIMAL(18,2), 标准库存数量确认 DECIMAL(18,2),  
        备注 NVARCHAR(255), 门店库存标准差 DECIMAL(18,2), 安全库存下限 DECIMAL(18,2), 门店计划 DECIMAL(18,2)  
    );  
  
    IF @RefreshRanking = 1  
    BEGIN  
        PRINT '步骤10: 全量模式 - 重新计算排名及标记...';  
          
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#RankedData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #RankedData;  
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActiveAmt') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActiveAmt;  
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActiveQty') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActiveQty;  
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#FinalResult') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #FinalResult;  
          
        SELECT *,  
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 门店名称, 分类组   
                ORDER BY 前90天销售金额 DESC, 前180天销售金额 DESC) AS 金额排名_全局,  
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 门店名称, 分类组   
                ORDER BY 前90天销售数量 DESC, 前180天销售数量 DESC) AS 数量排名_全局  
        INTO #RankedData  
        FROM #BaseData;  
  
        SELECT   
            门店名称, 分类组, 商品编码,  
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 门店名称, 分类组 ORDER BY 前90天销售金额 DESC) AS 活跃金额排名,  
            COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 门店名称, 分类组) AS 活跃金额总数  
        INTO #ActiveAmt  
        FROM #BaseData;  
  
        SELECT   
            门店名称, 分类组, 商品编码,  
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 门店名称, 分类组 ORDER BY 前90天销售数量 DESC) AS 活跃数量排名,  
            COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 门店名称, 分类组) AS 活跃数量总数  
        INTO #ActiveQty  
        FROM #BaseData;  
  
        CREATE INDEX IX_ActiveAmt ON #ActiveAmt (门店名称, 分类组, 商品编码);  
        CREATE INDEX IX_ActiveQty ON #ActiveQty (门店名称, 分类组, 商品编码);  
  
        SELECT   
            r.门店名称, r.商品编码, r.商品名称, r.规格, r.生产企业, r.单位,  
            r.标记, r.辅助标记, r.最近进价, r.库存数量, r.在途数量,   
            r.门店库存汇总, r.配送中心库存数量, r.前180天销售数量,   
            r.前90天销售数量, r.前30天销售数量, r.前90天销售金额,  
            r.金额排名_全局 AS 前90天销售金额排名, r.月均销售数量, r.库存日期,  
            CASE   
                WHEN r.前90天销售金额 > 0 THEN  
                    CASE   
                        WHEN a.活跃金额排名 <= CEILING(a.活跃金额总数 * 0.2) THEN '畅销A'  
                        WHEN a.活跃金额排名 <= CEILING(a.活跃金额总数 * 0.36) THEN '一般B'  
                        ELSE '滞销C'  
                    END  
                WHEN r.前90天销售金额 = 0 AND r.前180天销售金额 > 0 THEN '一品一签'  
                ELSE '不动销品'  
            END AS 金额版标记,  
            CASE   
                WHEN r.前90天销售数量 > 0 THEN  
                    CASE   
                        WHEN q.活跃数量排名 <= CEILING(q.活跃数量总数 * 0.2) THEN '畅销A'  
                        WHEN q.活跃数量排名 <= CEILING(q.活跃数量总数 * 0.36) THEN '一般B'  
                        ELSE '滞销C'  
                    END  
                WHEN r.前90天销售数量 = 0 AND r.前180天销售数量 > 0 THEN '一品一签'  
                ELSE '不动销品'  
            END AS 销量版标记  
        INTO #FinalResult  
        FROM #RankedData r  
        LEFT JOIN #ActiveAmt a ON r.门店名称 = a.门店名称 AND r.分类组 = a.分类组 AND r.商品编码 = a.商品编码  
        LEFT JOIN #ActiveQty q ON r.门店名称 = q.门店名称 AND r.分类组 = q.分类组 AND r.商品编码 = q.商品编码;  
  
        -- 清空并插入全量结果  
        TRUNCATE TABLE #NewData;  
  
        INSERT INTO #NewData  
        SELECT   
            r.门店名称, r.商品编码, r.商品名称, r.规格, r.生产企业, r.单位,  
            r.标记, r.辅助标记, r.最近进价, r.库存数量, r.在途数量,   
            r.门店库存汇总, r.配送中心库存数量, r.前180天销售数量,   
            r.前90天销售数量, r.前30天销售数量, r.前90天销售金额,  
            r.前90天销售金额排名, r.月均销售数量, r.库存日期,  
            r.金额版标记, r.销量版标记,  
     CASE   
                WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN '不动销品'  
                WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN '一品一签'  
                WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN '畅销AA'  
                ELSE r.金额版标记  
            END AS 高效采购标记90天_合并,  
            CASE   
                WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                ELSE 1.0  
            END AS 高效采购库存倍数,  
            CASE   
                WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                    CASE   
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                        WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                        ELSE 1.0  
                    END, 0)  
            END AS 标准库存数量,  
            CASE   
                WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                    CASE   
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                        WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                        WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                        ELSE 1.0  
                    END, 0)  
            END AS 标准库存数量确认,  
            '' AS 备注,  
            ROUND(r.门店库存汇总 -   
                CASE   
                    WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                    ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                        CASE   
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                            WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                            ELSE 1.0  
                        END, 0)  
                END, 0) AS 门店库存标准差,  
            ROUND((CASE   
                    WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                    ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                        CASE   
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                            WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                            ELSE 1.0  
                        END, 0)  
                END) / 2.0, 0) AS 安全库存下限,  
            CASE   
                WHEN (r.门店库存汇总 -   
                      CASE   
                          WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                          ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                              CASE   
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                                  WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                            WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                                  ELSE 1.0  
                              END, 0)  
                      END) > 0 THEN 0  
                WHEN r.门店库存汇总 > ROUND((CASE   
                          WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                          ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                              CASE   
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                                  WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                                  ELSE 1.0  
                              END, 0)  
                      END) / 2.0, 0) THEN -1  
                ELSE r.门店库存汇总 -   
                      CASE   
                          WHEN r.月均销售数量 = 0 OR (r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品') THEN 1  
                          ELSE ROUND(r.月均销售数量 *   
                              CASE   
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR r.销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN 0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR r.销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN 0  
                                  WHEN r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '畅销A' OR r.销量版标记 = '畅销A' THEN 2.0  
                                  WHEN r.金额版标记 = '一般B' OR r.销量版标记 = '一般B' THEN 1.5  
                                  ELSE 1.0  
                              END, 0)  
                      END  
            END AS 门店计划  
        FROM #FinalResult r;  
  
        PRINT '全量模式完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    END  
    ELSE  
    BEGIN  
        PRINT '步骤10: 增量模式 - 跳过排名重算...';  
          
        TRUNCATE TABLE #NewData;  
  
        INSERT INTO #NewData  
        SELECT   
            bd.门店名称, bd.商品编码, bd.商品名称, bd.规格, bd.生产企业, bd.单位,  
            bd.标记, bd.辅助标记, bd.最近进价, bd.库存数量, bd.在途数量, bd.门店库存汇总,  
            bd.配送中心库存数量, bd.前180天销售数量, bd.前90天销售数量, bd.前30天销售数量,  
            bd.前90天销售金额,  
            ISNULL(rs.[前90天销售金额排名], 0),  
            bd.月均销售数量, bd.库存日期,  
            NULL, NULL,  
            ISNULL(rs.[高效采购标记90天_合并], '不动销品'),  
            ISNULL(rs.[高效采购库存倍数], 0),  
            ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量], 1),  
            ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量确认], 1),  
            '' AS 备注,  
            ISNULL(rs.[门店库存标准差], ROUND(bd.门店库存汇总 - ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量确认], 1), 0)),  
            ISNULL(rs.[安全库存下限], ROUND(ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量确认], 1) / 2.0, 0)),  
            ISNULL(rs.[门店计划],   
                CASE   
                    WHEN bd.门店库存汇总 > ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量确认], 1) THEN 0  
                    WHEN bd.门店库存汇总 > ROUND(ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量确认], 1) / 2.0, 0) THEN -1  
                    ELSE bd.门店库存汇总 - ISNULL(rs.[标准库存数量确认], 1)  
                END)  
        FROM #BaseData bd  
        LEFT JOIN dbo.SPFXB_Result rs ON bd.门店名称 = rs.门店名称 AND bd.商品编码 = rs.商品编码;  
  
        PRINT '增量模式完成，记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    END  
  
    PRINT '步骤10 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤10b：公司汇总标记（基于门店销售数据，排除仓库类门店）  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤10b: 计算公司汇总标记...';  
      
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#company_mark') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #company_mark;  
    CREATE TABLE #company_mark (spid NVARCHAR(50), 公司汇总标记 NVARCHAR(50));  
  
    IF @RefreshRanking = 1  
    BEGIN  
        ;WITH CompanyBase AS (  
            SELECT   
                ISNULL(a.spid, b.spid) AS spid,  
                ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN a.MDMC NOT LIKE '%仓库%' THEN a.shl END), 0) AS q90_shl,  
                ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN a.MDMC NOT LIKE '%仓库%' THEN a.ssje END), 0) AS q90_amt,  
                ISNULL(SUM(b.qian180shl), 0) AS q180_shl,  
                ISNULL(SUM(b.qian180ssje), 0) AS q180_amt,  
                MAX(CASE WHEN s.BJ IN ('A','B','C','D','E') THEN 'A-E类' ELSE '其他类' END) AS 分类组  
            FROM #xshz a  
            FULL OUTER JOIN #qian180xsmx b ON a.spid = b.spid  
            LEFT JOIN #spfl s ON ISNULL(a.spid, b.spid) = s.spid  
            WHERE (a.MDMC IS NULL OR a.MDMC NOT LIKE '%仓库%')  
              AND (b.mdmc IS NULL OR b.mdmc NOT LIKE '%仓库%')  
            GROUP BY ISNULL(a.spid, b.spid)  
        ),  
        CompanyActive_Amt AS (  
            SELECT   
                spid,  
                分类组,  
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 分类组 ORDER BY q90_amt DESC) AS active_amt_rank,  
                COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 分类组) AS active_amt_total  
            FROM CompanyBase  
            WHERE q90_amt > 0  
        ),  
        CompanyActive_Qty AS (  
            SELECT   
                spid,  
                分类组,  
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 分类组 ORDER BY q90_shl DESC) AS active_qty_rank,  
                COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 分类组) AS active_qty_total  
            FROM CompanyBase  
            WHERE q90_shl > 0  
        ),  
        CompanyPre AS (  
            SELECT   
                c.spid,  
                c.分类组,  
                CASE   
                    WHEN c.q90_amt > 0 THEN  
                        CASE   
                            WHEN a.active_amt_rank <= CEILING(a.active_amt_total * 0.2) THEN '畅销A'  
                            WHEN a.active_amt_rank <= CEILING(a.active_amt_total * 0.36) THEN '一般B'  
                            ELSE '滞销C'  
                        END  
                    WHEN c.q90_amt = 0 AND c.q180_amt > 0 THEN '一品一签'  
                    ELSE '不动销品'  
                END AS 金额版标记,  
                CASE   
                    WHEN c.q90_shl > 0 THEN  
                        CASE   
                            WHEN q.active_qty_rank <= CEILING(q.active_qty_total * 0.2) THEN '畅销A'  
                            WHEN q.active_qty_rank <= CEILING(q.active_qty_total * 0.36) THEN '一般B'  
                            ELSE '滞销C'  
                        END  
                    WHEN c.q90_shl = 0 AND c.q180_shl > 0 THEN '一品一签'  
                    ELSE '不动销品'  
                END AS 销量版标记  
            FROM CompanyBase c  
            LEFT JOIN CompanyActive_Amt a ON c.spid = a.spid AND c.分类组 = a.分类组  
            LEFT JOIN CompanyActive_Qty q ON c.spid = q.spid AND c.分类组 = q.分类组  
        )  
        INSERT INTO #company_mark (spid, 公司汇总标记)  
        SELECT   
            spid,  
            CASE   
                WHEN 金额版标记 = '不动销品' OR 销量版标记 = '不动销品' THEN '不动销品'  
                WHEN 金额版标记 = '一品一签' OR 销量版标记 = '一品一签' THEN '一品一签'  
                WHEN 销量版标记 = '畅销A' AND 金额版标记 = '畅销A' THEN '畅销AA'  
                ELSE 金额版标记  
            END  
        FROM CompanyPre  
        WHERE spid IS NOT NULL;  
  
        INSERT INTO #company_mark (spid, 公司汇总标记)  
        SELECT DISTINCT spid, '不动销品'  
        FROM #jxc  
        WHERE spid NOT IN (SELECT spid FROM #company_mark);  
    END  
    ELSE  
    BEGIN  
        INSERT INTO #company_mark (spid, 公司汇总标记)  
        SELECT DISTINCT 商品编码, 公司汇总标记  
        FROM dbo.SPFXB_Result  
        WHERE 公司汇总标记 IS NOT NULL AND 公司汇总标记 != '';  
    END  
  
    PRINT '步骤10b 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤11：将结果写入目标表 SPFXB_Result  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤11: 更新目标表...';  
      
    IF @RefreshRanking = 1  
    BEGIN  
        TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.SPFXB_Result;  
    END  
    ELSE  
    BEGIN  
        DELETE T  
        FROM dbo.SPFXB_Result T  
        INNER JOIN #NewData N ON T.门店名称 = N.门店名称 AND T.商品编码 = N.商品编码;  
    END  
  
    INSERT INTO dbo.SPFXB_Result (  
        门店名称, 商品编码, 商品名称, 规格, 生产企业, 单位,  
        标记, 辅助标记, 最近进价, 库存数量, 在途数量, 门店库存汇总,   
        配送中心库存数量, 前180天销售数量, 前90天销售数量, 前30天销售数量,   
        前90天销售金额, 前90天销售金额排名, 高效采购标记90天_合并,   
        月均销售数量, 公司汇总标记, 库存日期, 高效采购库存倍数, 标准库存数量,   
        标准库存数量确认, 备注, 门店库存标准差, 安全库存下限, 门店计划  
    )  
    SELECT DISTINCT   
        ND.门店名称, ND.商品编码, ND.商品名称, ND.规格, ND.生产企业, ND.单位,  
        ND.标记, ND.辅助标记, ND.最近进价, ND.库存数量, ND.在途数量, ND.门店库存汇总,  
        ND.配送中心库存数量, ND.前180天销售数量, ND.前90天销售数量, ND.前30天销售数量,  
        ND.前90天销售金额, ND.前90天销售金额排名, ND.高效采购标记90天_合并,  
        ND.月均销售数量,   
        ISNULL(CM.公司汇总标记, '') AS 公司汇总标记,  
        ND.库存日期, ND.高效采购库存倍数, ND.标准库存数量,  
        ND.标准库存数量确认, ND.备注, ND.门店库存标准差, ND.安全库存下限, ND.门店计划  
    FROM #NewData ND  
    LEFT JOIN #company_mark CM ON ND.商品编码 = CM.spid;  
  
    PRINT '插入记录数: ' + CAST(@@ROWCOUNT AS VARCHAR);  
    PRINT '步骤11 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤12：恢复手工确认值  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤12: 恢复手工确认值...';  
      
    UPDATE T  
    SET   
        T.标准库存数量确认 = H.标准库存数量确认,  
        T.门店库存标准差 = T.门店库存汇总 - H.标准库存数量确认,  
        T.安全库存下限 = ROUND(H.标准库存数量确认 / 2.0, 0),  
        T.门店计划 = CASE   
            WHEN T.门店库存汇总 - H.标准库存数量确认 > 0 THEN 0  
            WHEN T.门店库存汇总 > ROUND(H.标准库存数量确认 / 2.0, 0) THEN -1  
            ELSE T.门店库存汇总 - H.标准库存数量确认  
        END  
    FROM dbo.SPFXB_Result T  
    INNER JOIN #HandConfirmBackup H   
        ON T.门店名称 = H.门店名称 AND T.商品编码 = H.商品编码;  
  
    PRINT '步骤12 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    -- =========================================================================  
    -- 步骤13：清理所有临时表  
    -- =========================================================================  
    PRINT '步骤13: 清理临时表...';  
      
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#HandConfirmBackup') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #HandConfirmBackup;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#NewData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #NewData;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#FinalResult') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #FinalResult;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#RankedData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #RankedData;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#BaseData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #BaseData;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActiveAmt') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActiveAmt;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActiveQty') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActiveQty;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#company_mark') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #company_mark;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IntransitFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IntransitFinal;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#xsmx') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #xsmx;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#kcmx') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #kcmx;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#spfl') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #spfl;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#xshz') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #xshz;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#jxc') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #jxc;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#qian180xsmx') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #qian180xsmx;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#tmp_kf1') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #tmp_kf1;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#tmp_kf2') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #tmp_kf2;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#tmp_kf3') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #tmp_kf3;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#tmp_sale30') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #tmp_sale30;  
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#tmp_ckkc') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #tmp_ckkc;  
  
    PRINT '步骤13 耗时(秒): ' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @StepTime, GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR);  
    SET @StepTime = GETDATE();  
  
    PRINT '===== SPFXB 执行完成 =====';  
    PRINT '结束时间: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120);  
END;
</user_query>

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"太好了！这就是真相！`SPFXB` 这个存储过程才是真正从 `ZHYYLS` 实时表取数据的：\n\n1. 步骤1：从 `ZHYYLS.dbo.Vbillindex` + `Vsalebill` 取90天销售明细\n2. 步骤2：取180天销售汇总\n3. 步骤3：从 `ZHYYLS.dbo.GoodsStocks` 取库存\n4. 步骤4：从 `ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype` 取商品信息\n5. 步骤8.5：从 `ZHYYLS.dbo.Gp_SendDoing` 取在途数量\n\n最后步骤11写入 `dbo.SPFXB_Result`。\n\n所以完整的链路是：\n```\nZHYYLS 实时表 → SPFXB 存储过程 → SPFXB_Result → usp_Sync_* → Supabase 缓存\n         ↑\n    需要手动或定时执行\n```\n\n但问题是 `SPFXB` 存储过程是谁调用的？从代码看：\n- `@RefreshRanking BIT = 1` 全量刷新（重算排名/标记）\n- `@RefreshRanking = 0` 数据刷新（只更新销售/库存/在途）\n\n30分钟定时任务执行的是 `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache`，它只是把 `SPFXB_Result` 的数据同步到缓存表，并没有调用 `SPFXB` 来更新 `SPFXB_Result`。\n\n所以 `SPFXB_Result` 的数据更新依赖于：\n1. 有人手动执行 `EXEC SPFXB` 或 `EXEC SPFXB 0`\n2. 或者有其他定时任务调用它\n\n需要确认 `SPFXB` 是怎么被调用的。"}

**找到真相了！** `SPFXB` 才是真正从 `ZHYYLS` 实时表取数的存储过程：

| 步骤 | 数据来源 |
|------|---------|
| 步骤1 | `ZHYYLS.dbo.Vbillindex` + `Vsalebill` → 90天销售 |
| 步骤3 | `ZHYYLS.dbo.GoodsStocks` → 库存 |
| 步骤4 | `ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype` → 商品信息 |
| 步骤8.5 | `ZHYYLS.dbo.Gp_SendDoing` → 在途数量 |
| 步骤11 | 写入 `SPFXB_Result` |

---

## 🔴 问题

`usp_Sync_ShortageStoreStockCache` **没有调用 `SPFXB`**，它只是从 `Shortage_StoreStockCache`（另一个缓存表）读数据。

所以现在的 30 分钟定时任务**根本不会刷新 SPFXB_Result 的实时数据**！

---

## ✅ 需要确认

`SPFXB` 这个存储过程现在是怎么被调用的？

| 方式 | 频率 |
|------|------|
| Excel VBA 手动跑？ | 每天/每周？ |
| 另一个定时任务？ | 需要查 |
| 没人调用？ | 数据就停留在上次执行时间 |

查一下有没有其他定时任务调用 `SPFXB`：

```sql
-- 查看 SQL Server 代理作业
SELECT name, enabled, description 
FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobs 
WHERE name LIKE '%SPFXB%' OR name LIKE '%商品分析%';

-- 查看是否有执行记录
SELECT TOP 10 
    text, 
    start_time, 
    status 
FROM sys.dm_exec_query_stats qs
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(qs.sql_handle)
WHERE text LIKE '%SPFXB%'
ORDER BY last_execution_time DESC;
```

或者最直接的：**`SPFXB` 上次是什么时候执行的？**

```sql
SELECT MAX(last_execution_time) 
FROM sys.dm_exec_procedure_stats 
WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('SPFXB');
```

查完告诉我，才能确定 30 分钟同步是否需要改成先调用 `SPFXB`。

---
