 @image:image.10fc8d1745.png 

1.查询结果，supabase.com里的存储过程是否有参与。

2.通过这个
VBA 执行存储过程来实现的



Option Explicit

' ============================================================
' 数据库连接参数
' ============================================================
Const SERVER_NAME = "121.229.175.49,1290"
Const DATABASE_NAME = "RQZT"
Const DB_USER = "00000"
Const DB_PASSWORD = "00000"

' 列号定义
Const COL_STORE = 1        ' A列 - 门店名称
Const COL_PRODUCT = 2      ' B列 - 商品编码
Const COL_CONFIRM = 24     ' X列 - 标准库存数量确认

' 工作表名称
Const CONFIG_SHEET = "Config"
Const DATA_SHEET = "标准库存"

' 连接字符串
Const CONN_STRING = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=" & SERVER_NAME & ";Initial Catalog=" & DATABASE_NAME & ";User ID=" & DB_USER & ";Password=" & DB_PASSWORD & ";"

' ============================================================
' 辅助函数
' ============================================================
Private Function GetLastOpTime(opType As String) As String
    Dim wsConfig As Worksheet, i As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsConfig = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CONFIG_SHEET)
    If wsConfig Is Nothing Then GetLastOpTime = "未知": Exit Function
    For i = 2 To wsConfig.Cells(wsConfig.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
        If Trim(wsConfig.Cells(i, 1).Value) = opType Then
            GetLastOpTime = wsConfig.Cells(i, 2).Value
            If GetLastOpTime = "" Then GetLastOpTime = "从未执行"
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    GetLastOpTime = "从未执行"
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Private Sub UpdateOpTime(opType As String)
    Dim wsConfig As Worksheet, i As Long, found As Boolean, j As Long
    Dim defaultOps As Variant
    defaultOps = Array("全量刷新", "数据刷新", "确认标准库存", "手动同步", "重置确认值", "生成采购计划", "拆分导出", "导入门店确认值", "导出采购计划", "上传订货")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsConfig = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CONFIG_SHEET)
    If wsConfig Is Nothing Then
        Set wsConfig = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add
        wsConfig.Name = CONFIG_SHEET
        wsConfig.Range("A1").Value = "操作名称"
        wsConfig.Range("B1").Value = "最后时间"
        For j = LBound(defaultOps) To UBound(defaultOps)
            wsConfig.Cells(j + 2, 1).Value = defaultOps(j)
            wsConfig.Cells(j + 2, 2).Value = ""
        Next j
        wsConfig.Columns("A:B").AutoFit
    End If
    found = False
    For i = 2 To wsConfig.Cells(wsConfig.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
        If Trim(wsConfig.Cells(i, 1).Value) = opType Then
            wsConfig.Cells(i, 2).Value = Format(Now, "yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:ss")
            found = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next i
    If Not found Then
        wsConfig.Cells(wsConfig.Cells(wsConfig.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row + 1, 1).Value = opType
        wsConfig.Cells(wsConfig.Cells(wsConfig.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row, 2).Value = Format(Now, "yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:ss")
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

Sub ExecuteNonQuery(sql As String)
    Dim conn As Object
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    conn.CommandTimeout = 600
    conn.Execute sql
    conn.Close
    Set conn = Nothing
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 刷新标准库存表（仅一次 RefreshAll）
' ============================================================
Sub RefreshStandardStockTable()
    ThisWorkbook.RefreshAll
    ' 商品编码文本格式
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(DATA_SHEET)
    If Not ws Is Nothing Then
        ws.Columns(COL_PRODUCT).NumberFormat = "@"
        Dim lastRow As Long
        lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, COL_PRODUCT).End(xlUp).row
        If lastRow >= 2 Then
            ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, COL_PRODUCT), ws.Cells(lastRow, COL_PRODUCT)).NumberFormat = "@"
        End If
    End If
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 1. 全量刷新（精简弹窗）
' ============================================================
Sub FullRefresh()
    Dim startTime As Double, elapsedSeconds As Long
    Dim answer As Integer, lastTime As String
    
    startTime = Timer
    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("全量刷新")
    
    answer = MsgBox("[全量刷新] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 重新计算所有销售、库存、在途、排名、标记、标准库存" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 补全"有在途无销售无库存"的商品" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 保留您手工确认的标准库存值" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 完成后自动生成采购计划" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "上次全量刷新时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "预计耗时 10-20 秒。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, "确认全量刷新")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    Application.StatusBar = "正在执行全量刷新..."
    DoEvents
    
    ExecuteNonQuery "EXEC dbo.SPFXB @RefreshRanking = 1;"
    
    UpdateOpTime "全量刷新"
    UpdateOpTime "数据刷新"
    
    RefreshStandardStockTable
    
    ' 静默生成采购计划
    GeneratePurchasePlan Silent:=True
    
    elapsedSeconds = CLng(Timer - startTime)
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[全量刷新完成]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 所有数据已更新" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 手工确认值已保留" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 采购计划已同步更新" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 数据已按门店、A-E类优先、排名升序排列" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "[耗时] " & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "全量刷新完成"
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[全量刷新失败]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误信息: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "全量刷新失败"
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 2. 数据刷新（增量）
' ============================================================
Sub DataRefresh()
    Dim startTime As Double, elapsedSeconds As Long
    Dim answer As Integer, lastTime As String
    
    startTime = Timer
    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("数据刷新")
    
    answer = MsgBox("[数据刷新] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 更新销售、库存、在途数据" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 重新计算派生字段（标准差、安全库存、门店计划）" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 不更新排名、标记、自动标准库存" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 保留手工确认值" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 完成后自动生成采购计划" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "上次数据刷新时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "预计耗时 5-15 秒。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, "确认数据刷新")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    Call IncrementalSync
    
    RefreshStandardStockTable
    
    GeneratePurchasePlan Silent:=True
    
    elapsedSeconds = CLng(Timer - startTime)
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[数据刷新完成]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 销售、库存数据已更新" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 派生字段已重新计算" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 采购计划已同步更新" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "[耗时] " & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "数据刷新完成"
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[数据刷新失败]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误信息: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "数据刷新失败"
End Sub

Private Sub IncrementalSync()
    ExecuteNonQuery "EXEC dbo.SPFXB @RefreshRanking = 0;"
    UpdateOpTime "数据刷新"
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 3. 手工确认标准库存（保持原有确认窗口）
' ============================================================
Private Sub ConfirmStandardStock()
    Dim startTime As Double
    Dim elapsedSeconds As Long
    Dim answer As Integer
    Dim conn As Object, ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, updateCount As Integer
    Dim storeName As String, productCode As String, newValue As Variant
    Dim dict As Object, rs As Object, key As String
    Dim lastTime As String
    
    startTime = Timer
    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("确认标准库存")
    
    answer = MsgBox("[手工确认] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 将您在当前工作表修改的「标准库存数量确认」值写入数据库" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 重新计算派生字段（标准差、安全库存、门店计划）" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 自动更新采购计划表" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "上次确认时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "预计耗时 1-3 秒。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, "确认标准库存")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Set ws = ActiveSheet
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, COL_STORE).End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "没有数据行，请先执行[数据刷新]或[全量刷新]。", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Application.StatusBar = "正在连接数据库..."
    DoEvents
    
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    conn.CommandTimeout = 60
    
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set rs = CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset")
    rs.Open "SELECT [门店名称], [商品编码], [标准库存数量确认] FROM dbo.SPFXB_Result", conn
    Do While Not rs.EOF
        key = rs.Fields(0).Value & "|" & rs.Fields(1).Value
        dict(key) = rs.Fields(2).Value
        rs.MoveNext
    Loop
    rs.Close
    
    updateCount = 0
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        storeName = ws.Cells(i, COL_STORE).Value
        productCode = ws.Cells(i, COL_PRODUCT).Value
        newValue = ws.Cells(i, COL_CONFIRM).Value
        If storeName <> "" And productCode <> "" And IsNumeric(newValue) Then
            key = storeName & "|" & productCode
            If dict.Exists(key) Then
                If CDbl(newValue) <> CDbl(dict(key)) Then
                    conn.Execute "UPDATE dbo.SPFXB_Result SET [标准库存数量确认] = " & newValue & _
                                 " WHERE [门店名称] = '" & Replace(storeName, "'", "''") & "' " & _
                                 "AND [商品编码] = '" & Replace(productCode, "'", "''") & "'"
                    updateCount = updateCount + 1
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    If updateCount > 0 Then
        conn.Execute "EXEC dbo.SPFXB_RefreshDerived;"
    End If
    
    conn.Close
    Set conn = Nothing
    
    UpdateOpTime "确认标准库存"
    GeneratePurchasePlan Silent:=True
    
    elapsedSeconds = CLng(Timer - startTime)
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    
    If updateCount > 0 Then
        MsgBox "[手工确认完成]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "[√] 已更新 " & updateCount & " 条确认值" & vbCrLf & _
               "[√] 派生字段已重新计算" & vbCrLf & _
               "[√] 采购计划已自动更新" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "[耗时] " & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "确认标准库存完成"
    Else
        MsgBox "[手工确认]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "未检测到确认值修改。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "采购计划已刷新（数据无变化）。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "[耗时] " & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "确认标准库存"
    End If
    
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[手工确认失败]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误信息: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "确认标准库存失败"
    If Not conn Is Nothing Then conn.Close
    Set conn = Nothing
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 4. 导入门店确认值（批量更新 + 差值过大提醒）
' ============================================================
Private Sub ImportStoreConfirm()
    Dim folderPath As String, fileName As String
    Dim wb As Workbook, ws As Worksheet, conn As Object
    Dim totalUpdate As Long, totalReset As Long
    Dim i As Long, lastRow As Long, col As Long
    Dim storeName As String, productCode As String, confirmValue As Variant
    Dim answer As Integer
    Dim fld As FileDialog
    Dim startTime As Double, elapsedSeconds As Long
    
    ' 动态列号
    Dim confirmCol As Long
    
    ' 批量 SQL
    Dim sqlBatch As String
    Const MAX_BATCH_LEN As Long = 32000
    Dim sqlPart As String
    Dim batchCount As Long
    
    ' 用于差异提醒
    Dim dictStdStock As Object          ' 存储系统标准库存
    Dim stdStock As Variant
    Dim diff As Double
    Dim alertMsg As String              ' 收集所有差值过大的商品
    Dim alertCount As Long              ' 差值过大商品数量
    
    startTime = Timer
    
    Set fld = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFolderPicker)
    fld.Title = "请选择门店回传文件所在的文件夹"
    fld.InitialFileName = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\"
    If fld.Show = -1 Then
        folderPath = fld.SelectedItems(1)
    Else
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    answer = MsgBox("将从以下文件夹导入门店确认值：" & vbCrLf & folderPath & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "规则：" & vbCrLf & _
                    "· 有数值的 → 更新为手工确认值" & vbCrLf & _
                    "· 空白的 → 重置为系统自动计算的标准库存" & vbCrLf & _
                    "· 确认值与系统标准库存相差超过50 → 提示但不阻止" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "导入门店确认值")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    Application.StatusBar = "正在连接数据库..."
    DoEvents
    
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    conn.CommandTimeout = 600
    
    totalUpdate = 0
    totalReset = 0
    fileName = Dir(folderPath & "\*.xlsx")
    
    Do While fileName <> ""
        Application.StatusBar = "正在处理文件: " & fileName
        DoEvents
        
        ' 提取门店名称
        storeName = Left(fileName, InStrRev(fileName, "标准库存确认表") - 1)
        If storeName = "" Then
            Set wb = Workbooks.Open(folderPath & "\" & fileName, ReadOnly:=True)
            Set ws = wb.Sheets(1)
            storeName = Trim(ws.Cells(2, 1).Value)
            wb.Close False
        End If
        
        If storeName = "" Then
            MsgBox "无法识别门店名称，跳过文件：" & fileName, vbExclamation
            fileName = Dir()
            GoTo NextFile
        End If
        
        Set wb = Workbooks.Open(folderPath & "\" & fileName, ReadOnly:=True)
        Set ws = wb.Sheets(1)
        
        lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
        If lastRow < 2 Then
            wb.Close False
            fileName = Dir()
            GoTo NextFile
        End If
        
        ' 动态查找确认列
        confirmCol = 0
        For col = 1 To ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column
            If Trim(ws.Cells(1, col).Value) = "标准库存数量确认" Then
                confirmCol = col
                Exit For
            End If
        Next col
        If confirmCol = 0 Then
            MsgBox "文件 " & fileName & " 中未找到"标准库存数量确认"列，跳过。", vbExclamation
            wb.Close False
            fileName = Dir()
            GoTo NextFile
        End If
        
        ' ========== ★ 提前获取该门店的系统标准库存 ★ ==========
        Set dictStdStock = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
        Dim rs As Object
        Set rs = CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset")
        rs.Open "SELECT [商品编码], [标准库存数量] FROM dbo.SPFXB_Result WHERE [门店名称] = '" & _
                 Replace(storeName, "'", "''") & "'", conn
        Do While Not rs.EOF
            dictStdStock(CStr(rs.Fields(0).Value)) = CDbl(rs.Fields(1).Value)
            rs.MoveNext
        Loop
        rs.Close
        Set rs = Nothing
        
        ' 初始化提醒信息
        alertMsg = ""
        alertCount = 0
        
        ' ========== 批量拼接 SQL ==========
        sqlBatch = ""
        batchCount = 0
        
        For i = 2 To lastRow
            productCode = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value)
            confirmValue = ws.Cells(i, confirmCol).Value
            
            If productCode <> "" Then
                If IsEmpty(confirmValue) Or confirmValue = "" Then
                    ' 重置为系统默认
                    sqlPart = "UPDATE dbo.SPFXB_Result SET [标准库存数量确认] = [标准库存数量]" & _
                              " WHERE [门店名称] = '" & Replace(storeName, "'", "''") & "'" & _
                              " AND [商品编码] = '" & Replace(productCode, "'", "''") & "';"
                    totalReset = totalReset + 1
                ElseIf IsNumeric(confirmValue) Then
                    ' 检查与标准库存的差值
                    If dictStdStock.Exists(productCode) Then
                        stdStock = dictStdStock(productCode)
                        diff = Abs(CDbl(confirmValue) - stdStock)
                        If diff > 50 Then
                            alertMsg = alertMsg & "商品 " & productCode & _
                                       "：确认值=" & confirmValue & _
                                       "，标准库存=" & stdStock & _
                                       "，差值=" & diff & vbCrLf
                            alertCount = alertCount + 1
                        End If
                    End If
                    
                    sqlPart = "UPDATE dbo.SPFXB_Result SET [标准库存数量确认] = " & confirmValue & _
                              " WHERE [门店名称] = '" & Replace(storeName, "'", "''") & "'" & _
                              " AND [商品编码] = '" & Replace(productCode, "'", "''") & "';"
                    totalUpdate = totalUpdate + 1
                Else
                    sqlPart = ""
                End If
                
                If Len(sqlPart) > 0 Then
                    If Len(sqlBatch) + Len(sqlPart) > MAX_BATCH_LEN And sqlBatch <> "" Then
                        conn.Execute sqlBatch
                        sqlBatch = ""
                        batchCount = batchCount + 1
                    End If
                    sqlBatch = sqlBatch & sqlPart
                End If
            End If
        Next i
        
        If sqlBatch <> "" Then
            conn.Execute sqlBatch
            batchCount = batchCount + 1
        End If
        
        ' 如果有差值过大，弹窗提醒
        If alertCount > 0 Then
            MsgBox "门店【" & storeName & "】存在 " & alertCount & " 个商品确认值与系统标准库存差距超过50：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                   alertMsg & vbCrLf & _
                   "系统已仍按您提供的确认值更新，如需修正请重新上传文件。", vbExclamation, "确认值异常提醒"
        End If
        
        wb.Close SaveChanges:=False
        fileName = Dir()
        
NextFile:
    Loop
    
    If totalUpdate + totalReset > 0 Then
        conn.Execute "EXEC dbo.SPFXB_RefreshDerived;"
    End If
    
    conn.Close
    Set conn = Nothing
    
    UpdateOpTime "导入门店确认值"
    
    ManualIncrementalSync Silent:=True
    GeneratePurchasePlan Silent:=True
    
    elapsedSeconds = CLng(Timer - startTime)
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    
    MsgBox "导入完成！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "已更新手工确认值：" & totalUpdate & " 条" & vbCrLf & _
           "已重置空白为系统默认值：" & totalReset & " 条" & vbCrLf & _
           "采购计划已同步更新" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "耗时：" & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "导入门店确认值"
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 5. 手动增量同步（增加 Silent 参数）
' ============================================================
Sub ManualIncrementalSync(Optional Silent As Boolean = False)
    Dim startTime As Double, elapsedSeconds As Long
    Dim answer As Integer, lastTime As String
    
    startTime = Timer
    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("手动同步")
    
    If Not Silent Then
        answer = MsgBox("[手动同步] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                        "[√] 从数据库拉取最新数据（不执行存储过程）" & vbCrLf & _
                        "[√] 刷新当前工作表" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                        "上次手动同步时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                        "预计耗时 1-5 秒。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                        "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, "确认手动同步")
        If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    End If
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    RefreshStandardStockTable
    UpdateOpTime "手动同步"
    elapsedSeconds = CLng(Timer - startTime)
    
    If Not Silent Then
        MsgBox "[手动同步完成]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "[√] 数据已刷新" & vbCrLf & _
               "[耗时] " & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "手动同步完成"
    End If
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    If Not Silent Then MsgBox "[手动同步失败]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & "错误信息: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "手动同步失败"
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 6. 生成采购计划（修复备份编码 + chkKey 变量声明）
' ============================================================
Sub GeneratePurchasePlan(Optional Silent As Boolean = False)
    Dim conn As Object, rs As Object, ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, dataRow As Long, i As Integer, colCount As Integer
    Dim firstDataRow As Integer, lastTime As String
    Dim dictActual As Object              ' 备份的实际订货值
    Dim actualCol As Long                 ' 原"实际订货"列号
    Dim productCode As String
    Dim actualValue As Variant
    Dim clearActual As Boolean            ' 是否清空实际订货列
    Dim userResponse As VbMsgBoxResult    ' 用于接收三按钮响应
    Dim wsBackup As Worksheet             ' 备份工作表
    Dim destRow As Long
    Dim hasValidData As Boolean           ' 是否存在非空白数据
    Dim chkKey As Variant                 ' 遍历字典用（★ 已声明）
    Dim bKey As Variant                   ' 遍历字典用
    Dim newActualCol As Long

    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("生成采购计划")

    ' ================= 手动调用时的弹窗确认 =================
    If Not Silent Then
        AppActivate Application.Caption
        If MsgBox("将重新生成采购计划表，覆盖现有「采购计划」工作表。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                  "上次生成时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                  "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "生成采购计划") = vbNo Then Exit Sub

        userResponse = MsgBox("是否清空「实际订货」列中已有的订货数量？" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                             "是(Y) - 清空所有订货记录" & vbCrLf & _
                             "否(N) - 保留已有订货数量" & vbCrLf & _
                             "取消   - 退出操作", vbYesNoCancel + vbQuestion, "清空实际订货")
        Select Case userResponse
            Case vbYes: clearActual = True
            Case vbNo:  clearActual = False
            Case vbCancel:
                Application.StatusBar = False
                Exit Sub
        End Select
    Else
        clearActual = False
    End If

    Application.StatusBar = "正在生成采购计划..."
    DoEvents

    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    ' ================= 获取采购计划工作表 =================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("采购计划")
    If ws Is Nothing Then
        Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add
        ws.Name = "采购计划"
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0

    ' ================= 查找并备份"实际订货"列 =================
    Set dictActual = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    actualCol = 0
    If ws.Cells(1, 1).Value <> "" Then
        For i = 1 To ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column
            If Trim(ws.Cells(1, i).Value) = "实际订货" Then
                actualCol = i
                Exit For
            End If
        Next i

        If actualCol > 0 Then
            lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
            For i = 2 To lastRow
                productCode = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 1).Text)   ' 使用 .Text 保留文本格式
                If productCode <> "" Then
                    actualValue = ws.Cells(i, actualCol).Value
                    dictActual(productCode) = actualValue
                End If
            Next i
        End If
    End If

    ' ================= 自动备份到隐藏工作表（修复编码） =================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsBackup = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("采购计划_备份")
    If wsBackup Is Nothing Then
        Set wsBackup = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add
        wsBackup.Name = "采购计划_备份"
        wsBackup.Visible = xlSheetHidden
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0

    hasValidData = False
    If dictActual.count > 0 Then
        For Each chkKey In dictActual.Keys
            If Not IsEmpty(dictActual(chkKey)) And Trim(dictActual(chkKey)) <> "" Then
                If IsNumeric(dictActual(chkKey)) Then
                    If CDbl(dictActual(chkKey)) <> 0 Then hasValidData = True: Exit For
                Else
                    hasValidData = True: Exit For
                End If
            End If
        Next chkKey
    End If

    If hasValidData Then
        wsBackup.Cells.Clear
        wsBackup.Columns(1).NumberFormat = "@"           ' 强制文本格式
        wsBackup.Range("A1").Value = "商品编码"
        wsBackup.Range("B1").Value = "实际订货"
        wsBackup.Range("C1").Value = Format(Now, "yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:ss")
        destRow = 2
        For Each bKey In dictActual.Keys
            wsBackup.Cells(destRow, 1).NumberFormat = "@"
            wsBackup.Cells(destRow, 1).Value = CStr(bKey) ' 强制文本写入
            wsBackup.Cells(destRow, 2).Value = dictActual(bKey)
            destRow = destRow + 1
        Next bKey
    Else
        wsBackup.Cells.Clear
    End If

    ' ================= 清空原有数据 =================
    firstDataRow = 2
    On Error Resume Next
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow >= firstDataRow Then
        ws.Rows(firstDataRow & ":" & lastRow).ClearContents
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0

    ' ================= 执行存储过程获取新数据 =================
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    conn.CommandTimeout = 120

    Set rs = CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset")
    rs.Open "EXEC dbo.usp_GetPurchasePlan", conn

    colCount = rs.Fields.count

    If ws.Cells(1, 1).Value = "" Then
        For i = 0 To colCount - 1
            ws.Cells(1, i + 1).Value = rs.Fields(i).Name
        Next i
        With ws.Rows(1)
            .Font.Bold = True
            .Interior.Color = RGB(0, 102, 204)
            .Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
        End With
        ws.Columns("A:Z").AutoFit
    End If

    ws.Columns(1).NumberFormat = "@"

    dataRow = firstDataRow
    Do While Not rs.EOF
        For i = 0 To colCount - 1
            If i = 0 Then
                ws.Cells(dataRow, i + 1).NumberFormat = "@"
                ws.Cells(dataRow, i + 1).Value = rs.Fields(i).Value
            Else
                ws.Cells(dataRow, i + 1).Value = rs.Fields(i).Value
            End If
        Next i
        dataRow = dataRow + 1
        rs.MoveNext
    Loop

    rs.Close
    conn.Close
    Set rs = Nothing
    Set conn = Nothing

    ' ================= 回填实际订货值（如果不清空） =================
    If Not clearActual And actualCol > 0 Then
        newActualCol = 0
        For i = 1 To ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column
            If Trim(ws.Cells(1, i).Value) = "实际订货" Then
                newActualCol = i
                Exit For
            End If
        Next i

        If newActualCol = 0 And dictActual.count > 0 Then
            newActualCol = ws.Cells(1, ws.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column + 1
            ws.Cells(1, newActualCol).Value = "实际订货"
            ws.Cells(1, newActualCol).Font.Bold = True
        End If

        If newActualCol > 0 Then
            For i = 2 To dataRow - 1
                productCode = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 1).Text)
                If productCode <> "" And dictActual.Exists(productCode) Then
                    ws.Cells(i, newActualCol).Value = dictActual(productCode)
                End If
            Next i
        End If
    End If

    UpdateOpTime "生成采购计划"

    Application.StatusBar = False

    If Not Silent Then
        AppActivate Application.Caption
        MsgBox "采购计划已更新，共 " & (dataRow - firstDataRow) & " 行数据。" & vbCrLf & _
               IIf(clearActual, "「实际订货」列已清空。", "「实际订货」列数据已保留。"), vbInformation
    End If
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    If Not Silent Then
        MsgBox "生成采购计划失败: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
    End If
    If Not conn Is Nothing Then conn.Close
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 恢复实际订货数据（修复编码匹配，显示备份时间）
' ============================================================
Sub RestoreActualOrder()
    Dim wsPlan As Worksheet, wsBackup As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, actualCol As Long
    Dim productCode As String, backupDict As Object
    Dim answer As Integer
    Dim backupTime As String

    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsPlan = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("采购计划")
    Set wsBackup = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("采购计划_备份")
    On Error GoTo 0

    If wsPlan Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox ""采购计划"工作表不存在。", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    If wsBackup Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "未找到历史备份，无法恢复。", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' 读取备份时间
    backupTime = Trim(wsBackup.Cells(1, 3).Text)
    If backupTime = "" Then backupTime = "未知"

    answer = MsgBox("将用备份数据恢复"实际订货"列。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "备份时间：" & backupTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "当前订货数据将被覆盖，是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "恢复实际订货")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub

    ' 构建字典，读取备份表，强制将商品编码转为文本
    Set backupDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    lastRow = wsBackup.Cells(wsBackup.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "备份表中没有数据。", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        ' 使用 .Text 属性获取单元格的原始文本（保留前导零）
        productCode = Trim(wsBackup.Cells(i, 1).Text)
        If productCode <> "" Then
            backupDict(productCode) = wsBackup.Cells(i, 2).Value
        End If
    Next i

    ' 在采购计划表中查找"实际订货"列
    actualCol = 0
    For i = 1 To wsPlan.Cells(1, wsPlan.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column
        If Trim(wsPlan.Cells(1, i).Value) = "实际订货" Then
            actualCol = i
            Exit For
        End If
    Next i
    If actualCol = 0 Then
        actualCol = wsPlan.Cells(1, wsPlan.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column + 1
        wsPlan.Cells(1, actualCol).Value = "实际订货"
        wsPlan.Cells(1, actualCol).Font.Bold = True
    End If

    ' 回填数据，匹配时也强制文本比较
    Dim rowCount As Long
    rowCount = wsPlan.Cells(wsPlan.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
    For i = 2 To rowCount
        productCode = Trim(wsPlan.Cells(i, 1).Text)   ' 获取采购计划的商品编码文本
        If backupDict.Exists(productCode) Then
            wsPlan.Cells(i, actualCol).Value = backupDict(productCode)
        End If
    Next i

    MsgBox "已成功恢复 " & backupDict.count & " 条实际订货记录。" & vbCrLf & _
           "恢复的备份时间：" & backupTime, vbInformation
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 7. 按门店拆分导出（最终版：数据区域边框、筛选、备注下拉）
' ============================================================
Sub SplitByStore()
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wbNew As Workbook
    Dim wsNew As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, col As Long, lastCol As Long
    Dim storeName As Variant
    Dim dict As Object
    Dim arrStores() As String
    Dim savePath As String
    Dim excludeCols As Object
    Dim headerName As String
    Dim key As Variant
    Dim answer As Integer
    Dim startTime As Double
    Dim elapsedSeconds As Integer
    Dim todayStr As String
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim safeName As String
    Dim confirmCol As Long
    Dim remarkCol As Long
    Dim shp As Object
    Dim lastTime As String
    Dim visibleRange As Range
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    Dim foundRemark As Boolean

    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("拆分导出")

    answer = MsgBox("[按门店拆分导出] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 按门店拆分数据到独立 Excel 文件" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 排除敏感字段，清空确认列" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 备注列可编辑，并提供下拉选项" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 删除按钮，生成无宏文件" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 保留原工作表格式、列宽、单元格样式" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 仅数据区域添加边框，开启筛选模式" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "上次导出时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "预计耗时 15-30 秒。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, "确认拆分导出")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub

    startTime = Timer
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False

    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    todayStr = Format(Date, "yyyymmdd")
    Set wsSource = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(DATA_SHEET)
    lastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row

    ' 敏感列定义
    Set excludeCols = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    excludeCols("最近进价") = True
    excludeCols("库存数量") = True
    excludeCols("在途数量") = True
    excludeCols("门店库存汇总") = True
    excludeCols("配送中心库存数量") = True
    excludeCols("前90天销售金额") = True
    excludeCols("门店库存标准差") = True
    excludeCols("安全库存下限") = True
    excludeCols("门店计划") = True
    excludeCols("库存日期") = True

    ' 查找确认列和备注列
    confirmCol = 0
    remarkCol = 0
    For col = 1 To wsSource.Cells(1, wsSource.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column
        headerName = Trim(wsSource.Cells(1, col).Value)
        If headerName = "标准库存数量确认" Then confirmCol = col
        If headerName = "备注" Then remarkCol = col
    Next col

    ' 收集所有门店
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        storeName = Trim(wsSource.Cells(i, 1).Value)
        If storeName <> "" Then dict(storeName) = True
    Next i

    If dict.count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "标准库存工作表中没有可导出的门店数据。", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanUp
    End If

    ReDim arrStores(1 To dict.count)
    i = 1
    For Each key In dict.Keys
        arrStores(i) = key
        i = i + 1
    Next key

    savePath = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\门店库存拆分\"
    If ThisWorkbook.Path = "" Then
        savePath = Environ("USERPROFILE") & "\Desktop\门店库存拆分\"
    End If
    On Error Resume Next
    MkDir savePath
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    For i = 1 To UBound(arrStores)
        storeName = arrStores(i)
        Application.StatusBar = "正在处理 " & storeName & " (" & i & "/" & UBound(arrStores) & ")"
        DoEvents

        ' 复制整个工作表（保留格式）
        wsSource.Copy
        Set wbNew = ActiveWorkbook
        Set wsNew = wbNew.Sheets(1)

        ' 表格转普通区域（避免筛选删除报错）
        On Error Resume Next
        For Each tbl In wsNew.ListObjects
            tbl.Unlist
        Next tbl
        On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

        ' 删除形状
        On Error Resume Next
        For Each shp In wsNew.Shapes
            shp.Delete
        Next shp
        On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

        ' 筛选法删除其他门店
        lastRow = wsNew.Cells(wsNew.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
        If lastRow > 1 Then
            With wsNew.Range("A1").Resize(lastRow, 1)
                .AutoFilter Field:=1, Criteria1:="<>" & storeName
                Set visibleRange = .Offset(1, 0).Resize(lastRow - 1, 1).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeVisible)
                If Not visibleRange Is Nothing Then visibleRange.EntireRow.Delete
                .AutoFilter
            End With
        End If

        lastRow = wsNew.Cells(wsNew.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row

        ' 清空确认列
        If confirmCol > 0 And lastRow >= 2 Then
            wsNew.Range(wsNew.Cells(2, confirmCol), wsNew.Cells(lastRow, confirmCol)).ClearContents
        End If

        ' 删除排除列（倒序，保留备注）
        For col = wsNew.UsedRange.Columns.count To 1 Step -1
            headerName = Trim(wsNew.Cells(1, col).Value)
            If excludeCols.Exists(headerName) Then
                wsNew.Columns(col).Delete
            End If
        Next col

        ' ---------- 处理备注列 ----------
        foundRemark = False
        For col = 1 To wsNew.UsedRange.Columns.count
            If Trim(wsNew.Cells(1, col).Value) = "备注" Then
                foundRemark = True
                remarkCol = col
                Exit For
            End If
        Next col

        If foundRemark Then
            wsNew.Columns(remarkCol).Hidden = False   ' 取消隐藏
            If lastRow >= 2 Then
                wsNew.Range(wsNew.Cells(2, remarkCol), wsNew.Cells(lastRow, remarkCol)).ClearContents
            End If
        Else
            remarkCol = wsNew.UsedRange.Columns.count + 1
            wsNew.Cells(1, remarkCol).Value = "备注"
            wsNew.Columns(1).Copy
            wsNew.Columns(remarkCol).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteFormats
            Application.CutCopyMode = False
            wsNew.Columns(remarkCol).ColumnWidth = 20
            wsNew.Cells(1, remarkCol).Font.Bold = True
        End If

        ' ---------- 备注列添加下拉选项 ----------
        If remarkCol > 0 And lastRow >= 2 Then
            With wsNew.Range(wsNew.Cells(2, remarkCol), wsNew.Cells(lastRow, remarkCol)).Validation
                .Delete
                .Add Type:=xlValidateList, AlertStyle:=xlValidAlertStop, _
                     Operator:=xlBetween, Formula1:="顾客订购,效期处理,滞销处理,季节性产品,活动促销"
                .IgnoreBlank = True
                .InCellDropdown = True
                .ShowInput = True
                .ShowError = True
            End With
        End If

        ' 商品编码列文本格式
        wsNew.Columns(2).NumberFormat = "@"

        ' ================== 仅对数据区域添加边框 ==================
        lastRow = wsNew.Cells(wsNew.Rows.count, 1).End(xlUp).row
        lastCol = wsNew.Cells(1, wsNew.Columns.count).End(xlToLeft).Column
        If lastRow >= 2 And lastCol >= 1 Then
            With wsNew.Range(wsNew.Cells(1, 1), wsNew.Cells(lastRow, lastCol))
                With .Borders(xlEdgeTop)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                    .Weight = xlThin
                End With
                With .Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                    .Weight = xlThin
                End With
                With .Borders(xlEdgeLeft)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                    .Weight = xlThin
                End With
                With .Borders(xlEdgeRight)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                    .Weight = xlThin
                End With
                With .Borders(xlInsideVertical)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                    .Weight = xlThin
                End With
                With .Borders(xlInsideHorizontal)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                    .Weight = xlThin
                End With
            End With
        End If

        ' ================== 开启筛选模式 ==================
        If lastRow >= 2 Then
            wsNew.Range("A1").CurrentRegion.AutoFilter
        End If

        Application.Goto wsNew.Range("A1"), True

        ' 保存为 .xlsx 无宏文件
        safeName = storeName
        safeName = Replace(safeName, "/", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, "\", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, ":", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, "*", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, "?", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, Chr(34), "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, "<", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, ">", "_")
        safeName = Replace(safeName, "|", "_")

        fileName = safeName & "标准库存确认表" & todayStr & ".xlsx"
        wbNew.SaveAs savePath & fileName, 51
        wbNew.Close SaveChanges:=False
    Next i

    UpdateOpTime "拆分导出"

    elapsedSeconds = Int(Timer - startTime)

    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "拆分导出完成！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "生成 " & UBound(arrStores) & " 个文件" & vbCrLf & _
           "保存位置：" & savePath & vbCrLf & _
           "已排除敏感字段、清空确认列" & vbCrLf & _
           "备注列含下拉选项，可编辑" & vbCrLf & _
           "仅数据区域有边框，已开启筛选" & vbCrLf & _
           "保留原格式和列宽" & vbCrLf & _
           "耗时：" & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "拆分导出完成"

CleanUp:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "拆分导出失败！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误信息：" & Err.Description & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "请检查：工作表是否有数据？保存位置是否可写入？", vbCritical, "拆分导出失败"
    Resume CleanUp
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 8. 重置标准库存确认值（精简弹窗）
' ============================================================
Sub ResetConfirmToStandard()
    Dim answer As Integer, startTime As Double, elapsedSeconds As Long
    Dim conn As Object, lastTime As String
    
    startTime = Timer
    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("重置确认值")
    
    answer = MsgBox("[重置确认值] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 将所有商品的【标准库存数量确认】重置为系统自动计算的标准库存" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 重新计算派生字段" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 刷新标准库存表和采购计划表" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "上次重置时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "注意：此操作将覆盖您所有手工修改的确认值，不可撤销！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "预计耗时 2-5 秒。" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion + vbDefaultButton2, "确认重置")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    Application.StatusBar = "正在重置确认值..."
    DoEvents
    
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    conn.CommandTimeout = 60
    conn.Execute "UPDATE dbo.SPFXB_Result SET [标准库存数量确认] = [标准库存数量];"
    conn.Execute "EXEC dbo.SPFXB_RefreshDerived;"
    conn.Close
    Set conn = Nothing
    
    UpdateOpTime "重置确认值"
    
    ' 静默刷新 Excel 和采购计划
    ManualIncrementalSync Silent:=True
    GeneratePurchasePlan Silent:=True
    
    elapsedSeconds = CLng(Timer - startTime)
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[重置确认值完成]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 所有确认值已重置为系统自动计算的标准库存" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 派生字段已重新计算" & vbCrLf & _
           "[√] 标准库存表和采购计划表已更新" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "[耗时] " & elapsedSeconds & " 秒", vbInformation, "重置确认值完成"
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "[重置确认值失败]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误信息: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "重置确认值失败"
    If Not conn Is Nothing Then conn.Close
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 9. 合并按钮：确认标准库存 / 导入门店确认值
' ============================================================
Sub StockConfirmOrImport()
    Dim res As Integer
    res = MsgBox("请选择操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                 "是(Y) - 手工确认（当前工作表修改）" & vbCrLf & _
                 "否(N) - 文件导入（门店回传文件）" & vbCrLf & _
                 "取消 - 退出", _
                 vbYesNoCancel + vbQuestion, "确认/导入标准库存")
    Select Case res
        Case vbYes: Call ConfirmStandardStock
        Case vbNo: Call ImportStoreConfirm
        Case vbCancel: ' 退出
    End Select
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 10. 导出采购计划表
' ============================================================
Sub ExportPurchasePlan()
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wbNew As Workbook
    Dim wsNew As Worksheet
    Dim savePath As String
    Dim todayStr As String
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim answer As Integer
    Dim shp As Object
    Dim wsTemp As Worksheet
    Dim vbComp As Object
    Dim lastTime As String
    
    lastTime = GetLastOpTime("导出采购计划")
    
    answer = MsgBox("[导出采购计划] 将执行以下操作：" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 将当前「采购计划」工作表导出为独立Excel文件" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 保留原列宽、行高、单元格格式（边框、颜色等）" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 删除新文件中的所有按钮和VBA代码" & vbCrLf & _
                    "[√] 文件名格式：采购计划_YYYYMMDD.xlsx" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "上次导出时间：" & lastTime & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "是否继续？", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "导出采购计划")
    If answer <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    todayStr = Format(Date, "yyyymmdd")
    Set wsSource = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("采购计划")
    If wsSource Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "找不到工作表「采购计划」，请先生成采购计划。", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    wsSource.Copy
    Set wbNew = ActiveWorkbook
    Set wsNew = wbNew.Sheets(1)
    
    On Error Resume Next
    For Each wsTemp In wbNew.Sheets
        For Each shp In wsTemp.Shapes
            shp.Delete
        Next shp
    Next wsTemp
    For Each vbComp In wbNew.VBProject.VBComponents
        wbNew.VBProject.VBComponents.Remove vbComp
    Next vbComp
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Application.Goto wsNew.Range("A1"), True
    
    savePath = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\门店库存拆分\"
    If ThisWorkbook.Path = "" Then
        savePath = Environ("USERPROFILE") & "\Desktop\门店库存拆分\"
    End If
    On Error Resume Next
    MkDir savePath
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    fileName = "采购计划_" & todayStr & ".xlsx"
    wbNew.SaveAs savePath & fileName, 51
    wbNew.Close SaveChanges:=False
    
    UpdateOpTime "导出采购计划"
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "导出完成！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "文件名称：" & fileName & vbCrLf & _
           "保存位置：" & savePath & vbCrLf & _
           "已删除所有按钮和VBA代码。", vbInformation, "导出采购计划"
    
CleanUp:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "导出采购计划失败！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误信息：" & Err.Description, vbCritical, "导出失败"
    Resume CleanUp
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 11. 上传订货数量（回写实际订货到数据库）
' 说明：读取采购计划表的 A列(商品编码) 和 X列(实际订货)
' ============================================================
Sub 上传订货数量()
    Dim conn As Object
    On Error GoTo ConnError
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    
    ' 列配置（如需修改列号，直接改下面数字即可）
    Dim colCode As Long, colQty As Long
    colCode = 1   ' A列 - 商品编码
    colQty = 25   ' Y列 - 实际订货数量
    
    ' 获取最后行
    Dim lastRow As Long
    lastRow = Cells(Rows.count, colCode).End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "没有数据"
        conn.Close: Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' 统计
    Dim success As Long, fail As Long, skip As Long
    success = 0: fail = 0: skip = 0
    
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        Dim code As String, qty As Variant
        code = Trim(Cells(i, colCode).Value)
        qty = Cells(i, colQty).Value
        
        ' 跳过空行或无效数据
        If code = "" Then
            skip = skip + 1
            GoTo NextRow
        End If
        If IsEmpty(qty) Or qty = "" Or qty = 0 Then
            skip = skip + 1
            GoTo NextRow
        End If
        If Not IsNumeric(qty) Then
            skip = skip + 1
            GoTo NextRow
        End If
        
        ' 调用存储过程写入
        Dim sql As String
        sql = "EXEC dbo.usp_UpdateActualOrder " & _
              "@商品编码='" & Replace(code, "'", "''") & "', " & _
              "@实际订货数量=" & CLng(qty) & ", " & _
              "@操作人='VBA'"
        
        On Error Resume Next
        conn.Execute sql
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        If Err.Number = 0 Then
            success = success + 1
            Cells(i, colQty).Interior.Color = RGB(198, 239, 206)   ' 绿色
        Else
            fail = fail + 1
            Cells(i, colQty).Interior.Color = RGB(255, 199, 206)   ' 红色
            Err.Clear
        End If
        
        ' 每20行刷新状态
        If i Mod 20 = 0 Then
            Application.StatusBar = "上传中: " & i & "/" & lastRow
            DoEvents
        End If
        
NextRow:
    Next i
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    conn.Close
    Set conn = Nothing
    
    UpdateOpTime "上传订货"
    
    MsgBox "上传完成！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "成功：" & success & " 条" & vbCrLf & _
           "失败：" & fail & " 条" & vbCrLf & _
           "跳过：" & skip & " 条（空行或0值）", vbInformation

    Exit Sub

ConnError:
    MsgBox "数据库连接失败！" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "错误：" & Err.Description & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "请检查：网络、服务器地址、用户名密码", vbCritical, "连接失败"
    If Not conn Is Nothing Then conn.Close
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 12. 查看订货记录
' ============================================================
Sub 查看订货记录()
    Dim conn As Object
    On Error GoTo ConnError
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    
    Dim sql As String, rs As Object
    sql = "SELECT 商品编码, 实际订货数量, 补货状态, 订货时间, 操作人 " & _
          "FROM dbo.Shortage_OrderFeedback " & _
          "ORDER BY 订货时间 DESC"
    
    Set rs = CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset")
    rs.Open sql, conn
    
    If rs.EOF Then
        MsgBox "暂无订货记录"
        rs.Close: conn.Close: Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' 创建结果 sheet
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("订货记录")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If ws Is Nothing Then
        Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add
        ws.Name = "订货记录"
    Else
        ws.Cells.Clear
    End If
    
    ' 表头
    ws.Cells(1, 1).Value = "商品编码"
    ws.Cells(1, 2).Value = "实际订货数量"
    ws.Cells(1, 3).Value = "补货状态"
    ws.Cells(1, 4).Value = "订货时间"
    ws.Cells(1, 5).Value = "操作人"
    
    ' 写入数据
    Dim row As Long
    row = 2
    Do While Not rs.EOF
        ws.Cells(row, 1).Value = rs("商品编码").Value
        ws.Cells(row, 2).Value = rs("实际订货数量").Value
        ws.Cells(row, 3).Value = rs("补货状态").Value
        ws.Cells(row, 4).Value = rs("订货时间").Value
        ws.Cells(row, 5).Value = rs("操作人").Value
        row = row + 1
        rs.MoveNext
    Loop
    
    rs.Close
    conn.Close
    Set rs = Nothing
    Set conn = Nothing
    
    ws.Columns("A:E").AutoFit
    MsgBox "已生成订货记录表，共 " & (row - 2) & " 条", vbInformation
    Exit Sub

ConnError:
    MsgBox "连接失败：" & Err.Description, vbCritical
    If Not conn Is Nothing Then conn.Close
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 13. 测试连接
' ============================================================
Sub 测试连接()
    Dim conn As Object
    On Error GoTo ConnError
    Set conn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    conn.Open CONN_STRING
    MsgBox "连接成功！", vbInformation
    conn.Close: Exit Sub

ConnError:
    MsgBox "连接失败：" & Err.Description, vbCritical
    If Not conn Is Nothing Then conn.Close
End Sub

' ============================================================
' 14. 清除颜色标记
' ============================================================
Sub 清除颜色()
    Cells.Interior.ColorIndex = xlNone
    MsgBox "颜色已清除", vbInformation
End Sub
</user_query>

Supabase 里的函数是 PostgreSQL 函数，不是 SQL Server 存储过程，它们不参与 SPFXB_Result 的生成\n\n结论：\n- `SPFXB` 存储过程**只能由 Excel VBA 手动调用**\n- 没有 SQL Server Agent 作业自动执行\n- 所以 SPFXB_Result 的数据新鲜度**完全取决于用户上次点击\"全量刷新\"或\"数据刷新\"的时间**\n\n30 分钟的定时任务只同步了缓存，没有真正刷新数据源。"}

**真相大白！** `SPFXB` 存储过程**只能由 Excel VBA 手动调用**，没有自动执行：

| 刷新方式 | 调用者 | 频率 |
|---------|--------|------|
| 全量刷新 | Excel VBA → `EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking = 1` | **手动** |
| 数据刷新 | Excel VBA → `EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking = 0` | **手动** |
| 30分钟定时任务 | Supabase Cron → `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache` | 每30分钟（但只搬数据，不刷新源） |

---

## 📊 现状

```
ZHYYLS 实时表（药房系统）
    ↓ 没人自动调用
Excel VBA 手动点击（SPFXB）
    ↓
SPFXB_Result（中间表）
    ↓ 30分钟同步（只读不写）
Supabase 缓存
    ↓
网页
```

**结论**：30 分钟同步**不会**让数据变新，它只是把旧的 SPFXB_Result 搬到 Supabase。数据新鲜度完全看用户上次点 Excel 刷新是什么时候。

---

## ❓ 需要改吗？

| 选择 | 做法 | 效果 |
|------|------|------|
| **保持现状** | 用户想刷新时，点 Excel 的「全量刷新」或「数据刷新」 | 简单，但依赖人工 |
| **改成自动** | 定时任务改成直接调用 `SPFXB`（需 sa 权限配置 SQL Server Agent）| 真正每30分钟从药房实时库取数 |

你倾向哪种？如果要自动，需要 DBA 在 SQL Server 上配置 Agent 作业调用 `SPFXB`。

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user wants me to propose a better architecture given that:\n1. ZHYYLS and RQZT are on the same SQL Server instance\n2. ZHYYLS = live business data, read-only, no modifications allowed\n3. RQZT = business analysis data, can be modified\n\nCurrent pain points:\n1. SPFXB_Result only updates when someone manually runs Excel VBA\n2. The 30-minute Supabase sync just copies stale data\n3. There are too many manual steps in the workflow\n\nLet me think about better options...\n\nOption A: SQL Server Agent job to call SPFXB on a schedule\n- Create a SQL Agent job in RQZT that runs `EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0` every 30 minutes\n- This would write fresh data from ZHYYLS → SPFXB_Result automatically\n- The Edge Function's 30-min cron would then sync fresh data to Supabase\n- No code changes needed in our system\n- Requires SQL Agent to be running and configured\n\nOption B: Call SPFXB directly from Edge Function\n- Instead of calling `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache`, call `SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0`\n- Wait for it to complete, then sync to Supabase\n- Problem: SPFXB might take 5-15 seconds, Edge Function timeout is usually 30-60 seconds\n- Could be borderline for @RefreshRanking=1 (10-20s)\n\nOption C: Cross-database view or synonym\n- Create a view in RQZT that directly queries ZHYYLS tables\n- Eliminate SPFXB_Result as an intermediate step\n- Our Edge Function reads from the view, which is always live\n- But SPFXB does complex calculations (ranking, standard stock computation) that can't be done in a simple view\n\nOption D: Hybrid approach\n- Use a SQL Agent job for periodic full refresh (SPFXB @RefreshRanking=1) - e.g., daily\n- Use a more frequent Edge Function call to SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0 for data refresh - e.g., every 30 min\n- Keep VBA for manual operations like confirming standard stock values, generating purchase plans\n\nOption E: Two-tier sync\n- Tier 1 (fast, frequent): Create a simple view/procedure in RQZT that pulls current stock and recent sales directly from ZHYYLS - runs every 5-10 min\n- Tier 2 (slow, daily): SPFXB full refresh for complex calculations (ranking, standard stock) - runs once daily\n- Store \"refresh\" button queries from Tier 1, ranking/standard stock from Tier 2\n\nI think the best approach is a combination:\n\n1. **SQL Agent Job for SPFXB data refresh**: Configure a SQL Server Agent job to run `SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0` every 30 minutes. This is the most impactful change because it eliminates the manual Excel step for daily data updates.\n\n2. **Keep full refresh (SPFXB @RefreshRanking=1) as manual or weekly**: The ranking calculations and standard stock computations are expensive and don't change daily. Run this weekly or when new products are added.\n\n3. **Simplify Supabase sync**: After the SQL Agent job runs SPFXB, the Edge Function's 30-minute cron will pick up fresh data.\n\n4. **Keep VBA for manual operations**: Excel is still needed for confirming standard stock values, generating purchase plans, splitting by store, and uploading order quantities.\n\nActually, let me think about whether we can even configure SQL Agent from here. If SQL Agent is not allowed or the user doesn't have access, we need alternatives.\n\nAlternative without SQL Agent: Call SPFXB directly from the Edge Function scheduled task:\n- The `scheduled-task` Edge Function already runs every 30 minutes\n- Instead of calling `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache`, call `SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0` \n- Then wait and call `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache` to sync to Supabase\n- Risk: SPFXB timeout in Edge Function (5-15 seconds should be fine for Deno Edge Functions which have ~60s timeout for paid tier, but could be tight)\n\nLet me present the options clearly."}

## 🏗️ 方案分析

基于同一个 SQL Server 实例、ZHYYLS 只读、RQZT 可改这个前提，核心问题是 **ZHY YLS → SPFXB_Result 这一步没人自动跑**。

---

### 方案 A：SQL Agent 定时执行 SPFXB（⭐⭐⭐ 推荐）

```
SQL Agent Job（RQZT 库内）
  ├── 每30分钟: EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0   （增量，5-15s）
  └── 每天凌晨: EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking=1   （全量，10-20s）
        ↓
SPFXB_Result（自动保鲜）
        ↓
Edge Function 定时任务 → Supabase 缓存
```

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 零代码改动，只加一个 SQL Agent 作业 | 需要 SQL Agent 服务开启 |
| 数据自动保鲜，不依赖 Excel | 需 DBA 配置一次 |
| 不碰 ZHYYLS，只读不写 | — |

---

### 方案 B：Edge Function 直接调 SPFXB

将 `scheduled-task` 改为直接调用 `SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0`，而非 `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache`：

```
Supabase Cron（每30分钟）
  ↓ POST /scheduled-task
Edge Function
  ├── EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0    ← 真正从 ZHYYLS 取数
  └── EXEC usp_Sync_AllShortageCache  ← 搬到 Supabase
```

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 不需 SQL Agent，纯 Supabase 侧改动 | SPFXB 耗时 5-15s，接近 Edge Function 超时 |
| 部署简单，改一处即可 | 全量刷新(1)可能超时 |
| ZHYYLS 只读 | 每次 30 分钟都跑增量，SQL Server 持续有负载 |

---

### 方案 C：RQZT 建跨库视图 + 定时物化

在 RQZT 建一个存储过程，**直接从 ZHYYLS 查实时数据 + 写入 RQZT 缓存表**，替代 SPFXB 的部分功能：

```sql
-- 新建存储过程（RQZT 库内）
CREATE PROCEDURE usp_Sync_LiveInventory
AS
BEGIN
    -- 直接从 ZHYYLS 查库存 + 近30天销售
    TRUNCATE TABLE RQZT.dbo.LiveStoreStock;
    
    INSERT INTO RQZT.dbo.LiveStoreStock
    SELECT 
        s.fullname AS 门店名称,
        p.usercode AS 商品编码,
        p.fullname AS 商品名称,
        SUM(gs.qty) AS 库存数量,
        ...  -- 从 ZHY YLS 实时表计算
    FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.GoodsStocks gs
    JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype p ON ...
    JOIN ZHYYLS.dbo.Vstock s ON ...
    GROUP BY ...
END
```

然后用 SQL Agent 或 Edge Function 定时调用这个小而快的存储过程。

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 轻量，几秒完成 | 需要重新写统计逻辑 |
| 不受 SPFXB 牵制 | 排名、标记等高级计算还要依赖 SPFXB |
| 可作为 SPFXB 的补充 | 工程量较大 |

---

## 📊 对比总结

| 维度 | 现状 | 方案 A | 方案 B | 方案 C |
|------|:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:|
| 数据新鲜度 | 看 Excel | ≤30分钟 | ≤30分钟 | ≤30分钟 |
| 改动量 | — | 1 个 SQL Agent 作业 | 改 1 个 Edge Function | 新建存储过程+改造 |
| 依赖 Excel | ✅ 必须 | ❌ 不用 | ❌ 不用 | ❌ 不用 |
| SPFXB 排名/标记 | 手动 | 自动 | 自动 | 需重写 |
| 风险 | — | 低 | 中（超时） | 中（工程量大） |

---

## 🎯 建议

**先上方案 A**（SQL Agent），成本最低、最稳妥。只需在 RQZT 库执行：

```sql
-- 增量刷新（每30分钟）
EXEC msdb.dbo.sp_add_job ... 
EXEC msdb.dbo.sp_add_jobstep ... @command = 'EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0;'

-- 全量刷新（每天凌晨 2 点）
EXEC msdb.dbo.sp_add_jobstep ... @command = 'EXEC SPFXB @RefreshRanking=1;'
```

配置完成后，Excel 的「数据刷新」按钮就不再是必需品了，保留用于手工确认和拆分导出即可。

The user clarifies:\n- SPFXB @RefreshRanking=1 (full refresh): runs monthly to recalculate rankings and tags\n- SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0 (incremental refresh): can run anytime to update stock, sales, in-transit data\n\nGiven this, the approach should be:\n1. Use SQL Agent (方案 A) to run SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0 periodically (every 30 min or hourly) for fresh inventory/sales data\n2. Keep SPFXB @RefreshRanking=1 as a monthly manual operation (via Excel VBA or SQL Agent monthly schedule)\n\nThis makes 方案 A the clear winner because:\n- It only needs 1 SQL Agent job (for incremental refresh)\n- The monthly full refresh can remain manual or be scheduled\n- No code changes needed\n- No risk of Edge Function timeout\n\n方案 B would also work but has timeout risk. 方案 C is overkill.\n\nThe recommendation should be 方案 A with:\n- SQL Agent job every 30 min running SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0\n- Monthly full refresh can remain manual in Excel or also be a monthly SQL Agent job"}

**方案 A（SQL Agent）**最好，理由直接：

---

## 方案 A 完全契合

| SPFXB 调用 | 频率 | 方案 A 实现 |
|-----------|------|------------|
| `@RefreshRanking=0` 增量 | 每 30 分钟 | SQL Agent 定时作业 |
| `@RefreshRanking=1` 全量 | 每月 1 次 | 保留 Excel VBA 手动（或也加 SQL Agent 月作业） |

---

## 为什么方案 A 最适合

| 对比 | 方案 A | 方案 B | 方案 C |
|------|:--:|:--:|:--:|
| 增量刷新 5-15s | ✅ SQL Agent 无超时风险 | ❌ 接近 Edge Function 30s 限制 | — |
| 全量刷新保留手动 | ✅ 完全兼容 | — | — |
| 改动量 | 1 个作业 | 改代码+部署 | 重写逻辑 |
| 依赖外网 | ❌ 不需要 | ✅ 要 Supabase → SQL Server | — |
| 稳定性 | 最稳 | 受网络抖动影响 | 需新建表维护 |

---

## 简化实施

只需在 SSMS 执行一条命令，加一个 SQL Agent 作业：

```
作业名：SPFXB_DataRefresh
频率：  每 30 分钟
命令：  EXEC RQZT.dbo.SPFXB @RefreshRanking = 0;
```

全量刷新每月跑一次，继续在 Excel 里点就行，不用动。

</user_query>

---

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user wants to know exactly how to set up the SQL Agent job. Let me give them the exact SQL commands to run in SSMS on the RQZT database.\n\nSince ZHYYLS and RQZT are on the same instance, and the SPFXB procedure is in RQZT, the job should be created in msdb (SQL Agent system database) with the job step targeting RQZT.\n\nLet me provide the exact SQL commands."}

对，在 SSMS 连到同一个实例，执行以下 SQL（直接复制粘贴即可）：

```sql
USE msdb;
GO

-- 1. 创建作业
EXEC dbo.sp_add_job
    @job_name = N'SPFXB_增量刷新_每30分钟',
    @enabled = 1,
    @description = N'每30分钟从ZHYYLS实时取库存/销售/在途数据，写入SPFXB_Result',
    @owner_login_name = N'sa';

-- 2. 添加作业步骤（指定执行 RQZT 库的 SPFXB）
EXEC dbo.sp_add_jobstep
    @job_name = N'SPFXB_增量刷新_每30分钟',
    @step_name = N'执行增量刷新',
    @subsystem = N'TSQL',
    @command = N'EXEC RQZT.dbo.SPFXB @RefreshRanking = 0;',
    @database_name = N'RQZT';

-- 3. 设置调度（每30分钟）
EXEC dbo.sp_add_schedule
    @schedule_name = N'每30分钟',
    @freq_type = 4,              -- 每天
    @freq_interval = 1,          -- 每天
    @freq_subday_type = 4,       -- 按分钟
    @freq_subday_interval = 30;  -- 间隔30分钟

-- 4. 绑定调度到作业
EXEC dbo.sp_attach_schedule
    @job_name = N'SPFXB_增量刷新_每30分钟',
    @schedule_name = N'每30分钟';

-- 5. 立即启动作业
EXEC dbo.sp_start_job @job_name = N'SPFXB_增量刷新_每30分钟';
GO
```

---

## 验证

执行后去 SSMS → **SQL Server 代理** → 作业 → 右键 `SPFXB_增量刷新_每30分钟` → 查看历史记录，确认执行成功。

然后你可以把 Supabase 的 30 分钟定时任务**停掉或改成只在增量刷新后搬运数据**，避免重复跑空。

```diff
门店「刷新库存」按钮
- 旧：EXEC usp_Sync_AllShortageCache（没用的空壳）

## 🔄 最终数据流

```
ZHYYLS 实时表（药房系统）
  ↓ SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0
  │  ├── SQL Agent 每30分钟自动跑
  │  └── 门店点击「刷新库存」立刻跑
  │
SPFXB_Result（保鲜 ≤5-15s 内的旧数据）
  ↓ 直接查询
门店前端（实时库存）
```

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user is asking a good question: if the store's refresh button now directly calls `SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0`, is the SQL Agent job still needed?\n\nLet me think about this:\n\n1. Store clicks refresh → SPFXB runs → gets latest data → shows it. This gives REAL-TIME data.\n2. SQL Agent every 30 min → SPFXB runs → SPFXB_Result is kept fresh → Supabase cache can have fresh data.\n\nThe key difference:\n- Store refresh: the user actively triggers it, gets latest data, but has to wait 5-15s\n- SQL Agent: keeps SPFXB_Result periodically fresh, so when the store opens the page (without clicking refresh), they see reasonably fresh data from Supabase cache (50ms)\n\nBut wait - the Supabase cache is populated by `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache` which just reads from SPFXB_Result. If SPFXB_Result is stale (not refreshed by SPFXB), then the Supabase cache will also be stale.\n\nSo the question becomes: do we need the SQL Agent if stores can manually refresh?\n\nMy recommendation: YES, the SQL Agent is still useful because:\n1. Stores shouldn't have to click refresh every time they open the app\n2. The Supabase cron syncs SPFXB_Result → Supabase cache, so store opening is instant (50ms)\n3. If SPFXB_Result is kept fresh by SQL Agent, the Supabase cache data is fresh too\n4. The store's refresh button becomes a \"force get latest NOW\" option, not the only way to get fresh data\n\nBut actually, the user raises a valid point. If the store refresh button now calls SPFXB directly, the SQL Agent becomes somewhat redundant for the \"store experience\". The store can just click refresh to get the latest.\n\nHowever, there's still value in the SQL Agent:\n- It keeps the data baseline fresh for all stores simultaneously\n- When a store opens the app, they see data that's at most 30 minutes old\n- They don't HAVE to click refresh to see reasonable data\n- Only click refresh when they need absolutely latest\n\nMy recommendation: Keep the SQL Agent. It provides a good baseline freshness. The store refresh is for \"I need it NOW\" situations.\n\nAlso, the Supabase 30-min cron is still needed to sync to Supabase cache so the initial load is fast."}

**两者不冲突，建议都保留：**

| 方式 | 场景 | 耗时 | 频率 |
|------|------|:--:|------|
| SQL Agent 30min | 门店**打开页面**就有较新数据 | 后台静默 | 自动 |
| 门店「刷新库存」 | 想看**此刻最新**的库存 | 5-15s | 手动 |

---

## 为什么 SQL Agent 还需要

```
没有 SQL Agent：
  门店打开 → Supabase缓存(可能是几小时前Excel跑的数据) → 每次得点刷新

有 SQL Agent：
  门店打开 → Supabase缓存(≤30分钟) → 满意就不点刷新，不满意点一下
```

**减少门店点击频率**。如果每30分钟自动保鲜，门店大部分时候打开页面就能看到最新数据，不需要每次都等 5-15 秒。

---

## 建议

SQL Agent 保留，频率可以放宽：

```
之前：每30分钟（担心数据太旧）
现在：每30分钟或每1小时（刷新按钮随时兜底）
```

门店点刷新 = 终极保障，SQL Agent = 日常保鲜。

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"管理员电脑上显示门店选择框被锁定（显示\"已绑定\"），但下拉内容是空的。这是因为管理员电脑已经被某个门店账号绑定了，所以只显示已绑定的门店选项。\n\n但问题是门店列表没有填充。这可能是因为 `device_bound_stores` 缓存中没有数据，或者 `fillAccounts` 没有正确触发。\n\n这不是一个bug，是设计如此：如果设备已绑定门店，应该只显示绑定的门店，而不是所有门店。\n\n但门店列表为空说明 `device_bound_stores` 缓存有问题，或者 Edge Function 返回了空数组。\n\n我需要帮用户理解这个情况，这不是问题，而是设备绑定机制在起作用。管理员电脑已经被绑定了，所以需要：\n1. 要么用绑定的门店账号登录\n2. 要么从管理后台解除该设备的绑定\n\n但这也不是用户想要的，用户想测试门店端，但被设备绑定限制了。\n\n最简单的解决方案是清除浏览器缓存中的设备码，让系统生成新的设备码，这样就可以重新选择门店了。"}

这是正常的设备绑定机制。你的管理员电脑已经被某个门店绑定了，所以只显示该门店（但下拉列表可能缓存异常没显示出来）。

**两种解决方案：**

## 方案1：清除设备码（推荐测试用）

按 **F12** → **Console** 粘贴执行：

```javascript
localStorage.removeItem('wszh_device_id_v2');
localStorage.removeItem('device_bound_stores');
location.reload();
```

刷新后生成新设备码，可以重新选门店。

---

## 方案2：从管理后台解绑

管理后台 → 设备授权 → 找到你当前电脑的 device_id → 撤销授权。

---

## 根本原因

之前设的严格绑定规则：
> 设备一旦授权，换电脑必须管理员解绑

你的浏览器 localStorage 里存着旧设备码，被绑定到某个门店了。清掉就重新生成新的，相当于"新电脑"。

---

最快的：**直接清掉当前电脑的设备码**，重新登录就行了。

页面加载完成后 **F12** → **Console** → 粘贴：

```javascript
localStorage.removeItem('wszh_device_id_v2');
localStorage.removeItem('device_bound_stores');
localStorage.removeItem('lastStore');
localStorage.removeItem('lastAccount');
localStorage.removeItem('lastMode');
location.reload();
```

然后用 `15305479520` 选 02店登录即可。`15305479520` 已在豁免名单，不需要设备授权。

---

> 这只是清当前浏览器/客户端，不影响其他门店的电脑。如果不放心，也可以在管理后台 → 设备授权 → 找到这个设备号 → 撤销。

Then:\n- Other stores that are already logged in and looking at Supabase cache: they see stale data until they also click refresh (because they're reading from Supabase cache, not SPFXB_Result directly)\n- Other stores that click refresh: they trigger SPFXB again (redundant, but will get fresh data from SPFXB_Result)\n\nSo the answer is: the data in SPFXB_Result IS updated for all stores after one store clicks refresh. The Supabase 30-min cron syncs SPFXB_Result → Supabase cache\n\nActually wait, when store opens the page, what do they read? Let me think...\n\nThe store page reads from Supabase cache (shortage_storestock_cache) by default. This is synced every 30 minutes by the cron. First calls SPFXB (which is redundant if someone else just did it)\n2. Then queries SPFXB_Result directly\n\nSo YES, after 02店 clicks refresh:\n- SPFXB_Result is updated for ALL stores (because SPFXB refreshes all stores)\n- If 04店 clicks refresh → queries fresh SPFXB_Result → gets the latest data\n- If 04店 just opens the page → reads Supabase cache → gets up to 30-min-old data\n\nSo the Supabase cron IS still helpful for keeping the default page view somewhat fresh."}

**SPFXB 是全局刷新的**，一次调用就更新**所有门店**的库存。

| 场景 | 数据来源 | 新鲜度 |
|------|------|:--:|
| 02店点刷新 → 02店看到 | 直接查 SPFXB_Result | ✅ 最新 |
| 02店点刷新后 → 04店打开页面 | Supabase 缓存 | ⚠️ 可能是 30 分钟前的 |
| 02店点刷新后 → 04店也点刷新 | 直接查 SPFXB_Result | ✅ 最新（不会重复跑 SPFXB，直接查） |

---

SPFXB 刷新一次所有店就都更新了，**但其他店打开页面看到的是 Supabase 缓存**（≤30 分钟旧）。所以他们只要也点一下刷新就行。

We could create a simple tracking table in RQZT:\n\n```sql\nCREATE TABLE RQZT.dbo.SPFXB_SyncLog (\n    id INT IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,\n    refresh_type VARCHAR(10),  -- '增量' or '全量'\n    refreshed_at DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE()\n);\n```\n\nThen SPFXB would insert a row each time it runs. But modifying SPFXB affects the Excel workflow.\n\nSimplest approach: Just use Supabase. When `get_store_inventory` runs with sync_first=true and SPFXB completes, save a timestamp to Supabase `sync_metadata` table. In `get_store_inventory`, when SPFXB is executed (sync_first=true), save the current time to Supabase\n2. Every call to `get_store_inventory` returns this time as part of the response\n3. ## 要不要改？

| 不改 | 改 |
|------|------|
| 打开快（50ms），但可能是旧数据 | 打开慢（1-3s），但保证最新 |
| 依赖 30 分钟同步 | 不依赖同步，每次打开都实时 |

**建议不改**，因为：
1. 门店已经习惯点「刷新库存」拿最新数据
2. 打开页面等 3 秒体验不好
3. 时间提示已经告诉门店数据多旧了，他自己决定要不要刷新

## 问题根因

Edge Function 的 CORS 白名单只认 `https://wszhyy.pages.dev`，Cloudflare 每次部署生成新子域名（`https://5d25a5d3.wszhyy.pages.dev`），没在白名单里 → 浏览器拦截请求 → `Failed to fetch`

## 修复

现在允许所有 `*.wszhyy.pages.dev` 子域名 + localhost。

**刷新页面即可登录！**

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"Now I understand the full picture:\n\n1. `usp_AutoDetectOrderStatus_Feedback` (line 186-203) checks if a store's stock has been replenished and marks it as \"已到货\"\n\nThe issue is at line 199:\n```sql\nWHERE f.补货状态 = '已订购'\n  AND s.库存数量 >= ISNULL(s.标准库存数量, 0)\n  AND s.标准库存数量 > 0;\n```\n\nThis checks `Shortage_StoreStockCache` table which is a CACHE table in RQZT. The problem is:\n- SPFXB_Result gets updated (by store refresh or Excel VBA)\n- But `Shortage_StoreStockCache` only gets updated by `usp_Sync_AllShortageCache`\n- And `usp_Sync_StoreStockCache` just counts rows (does nothing)\n- So `Shortage_StoreStockCache` is stale!\n\nThe fix: Change `usp_AutoDetectOrderStatus_Feedback` to query from `SPFXB_Result` instead of `Shortage_StoreStockCache`.\n\nBut `SPFXB_Result` has multiple rows per product (one per store), while the check is per-product. The auto-detect needs to check if the product's TOTAL inventory across all stores has been replenished.\n\nActually, looking more carefully, the SPFXB_Result has:\n- 配送中心库存数量 (DC stock) - per product per store (but same value across all stores)\n- 库存数量 (store stock)\n\nWhen a product is ordered, the flow is:\n1. Vendor ships → DC receives → 配送中心库存数量 > 0\n2. DC distributes to stores → store inventory increases\n\nThe simplest check: use SPFXB_Result instead of Shortage_StoreStockCache. | ② `usp_AutoDetectOrderStatus_Feedback` | 自动检测已订购→已到货 |
| ③ Supabase 同步 | 写入 `shortage_storestock_cache` |

### 3️⃣ 自动检测到货修复

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user is asking whether the duplicate report check should be per-store (the same store can't report the same product twice) or across all stores (if any store has already reported a product, no other store can report it).\n\nFrom a business perspective:\n- Each store manages its own inventory independently\n- If 02店 reports product A as out of stock, that's independent from 03店 also reporting product A\n- So duplicate detection should be **per store** - a store shouldn't report the same product twice, but different stores can each report their own shortages\n\nThis makes the most sense for a chain pharmacy where each store has its own inventory."}

**本店。** 同一门店不重复报同一个商品即可。

| 规则 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| 02店报商品 A → 02店再报 A | ❌ 重复，提醒 |
| 02店报商品 A → 03店也报 A | ✅ 不同门店，各自独立 |

因为每个门店库存独立，02店的缺货和03店的缺货是两回事。

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user wants to understand what \"前后端双重去重\" means.\n\nLet me explain simply:\n1. Frontend (前端): Before the store clicks \"submit\", check the local history and pop up a warning immediately - no network request needed. Fast response.\n2. Backend (后端): Even if the frontend somehow bypasses the check (or data is stale), the Edge Function checks the database before inserting and rejects duplicates.\n\nThis is a safety net approach.\n\nBut actually, for simplicity, just doing one of them is enough. Frontend-only is faster but can be fooled (if cache is old). Backend-only always works but the user already clicked submit before getting the error.\n\nLet me suggest just one good approach: backend + a brief check on the frontend."}

| **后端** | 数据写入数据库前 | 最后一道防线，前端漏了也能拦住 |

## 📋 修改汇总

### 1️⃣ 重复上报拦截（Edge Function 已部署）

```
同门店 + 同商品 + 7天内 → "该商品已于 X/Y 上报过，状态为「待处理」，7天内请勿重复上报"
```

| 场景 | 结果 |
|------|------|
| 02店报商品A → 02店再报A | ❌ 拦截 |
| 02店报商品A → 03店报A | ✅ 不同门店，放行 |
| 02店报商品A → 7天后再报A | ✅ 超时，放行 |

### 2️⃣ 状态闭环

```
上报时判断：
  ├── 在途 > 0 → "配货中"
  └── 无在途 → "待处理"

同步采购计划时自动检测：
  ├── 已订购 + 在途 > 0 → "配货中"
  └── 已订购/配货中 + 库存达标 → "已完成"
```

```
完整流程：待处理 → 已订购 → 配货中 → 已完成
```

### ⚠️ 还需手动执行

在 SSMS 打开 `sql/fix_auto_detect_arrival.sql`，执行覆盖存储过程。这一步不改数据库的话自动检测不会生效。

## 使用方式

**门店上报商品：**
```
在途>0 → 自动 "配货中"
无在途 → 自动 "待处理"
```

**管理员同步采购计划：**
```
点击「同步采购计划」→ 自动检测：
  ├── 在途>0 → "配货中"
  └── 库存达标 → "已完成"
```

**重复上报：**
```
7天内同商品 → 报错 "已于 X/Y 上报过，状态为「XX」，请勿重复上报"
```

刷新 `https://5d25a5d3.wszhyy.pages.dev` 即可使用。

None of today's changes touch electron-main.js.\n\nSo:\n- No reinstalled needed - all changes are on the server or Cloudflare Pages\n- The client auto-update mechanism works via check-update Edge Function, but it only triggers when there's a new exe version. **不需要重装。** 今天改的全是服务端和网页：

| 改动 | 类型 | 生效方式 |
|------|:--:|------|
| 重复上报拦截 | Edge Function | 已部署，刷新即生效 |
| 状态闭环 SQL | 数据库 | 已执行 |
| 刷新时间提示 | 前端页面 | Cloudflare 已部署 |
| 刷新按钮位置 | 前端页面 | Cloudflare 已部署 |

门店端直接刷新页面就行。如果客户端缓存没清，重启一下客户端即可。

> 🚀 自动更新是给 `.exe` 用的，今天没改 `electron-main.js`，不需要推新安装包。

020493 现在是无库存商品 为什么搜索不到此商品    目前的商品品种机制是什么 暂时无需改动
</user_query>

---

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user is asking why product code 020493 can't be found in the search. Let me trace the product search mechanism.\n\nThere are two layers:\n1. Frontend: Fuse.js searches the `allProducts` array (loaded from localStorage or Edge Function)\n2. Backend: Edge Function `search_product` action searches Supabase `product_cache` table, then falls back to SQL Server `Vptype`\n\nThe product cache is populated during `sync_product_cache` or similar actions. Let me check how the cache is populated and what the search logic is."}

🔧 **Tool Call**: search_content


---

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"Now I can see the search mechanism:\n\n1. `search_product` searches `product_cache` (Supabase table)\n2. `product_cache` is populated by `sync_product_cache` which queries `ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype` with condition `leveal = '3'`\n3. Additionally, only products with sales in the last 2 years or with current stock are included\n\nSo 020493 might not be in `product_cache` because:\n- It's not in Vptype with leveal='3'\n- OR it hasn't been sold in 2 years and has no stock\n- OR the `product_cache` sync hasn't run recently\n\nThe user said 020493 is a \"无库存商品\" (no stock product). If it also has no sales in 2 years, it would be excluded from `sync_product_cache`.\n\nLet me also check the `get_all_products` query which also has filtering."}

🔧 **Tool Call**: read_file (g:/Trae项目/缺货统计系统/supabase/functions/query-shortage-data/index.ts (1098-1127))


---

**CodeBuddy**

{"type":"reasoning","text":"Found the reason. The `sync_product_cache` query at line 1098-1125 filters products by:\n\n1. `leveal = '3'` (must be level 3 in Vptype - meaning it's a sellable product)\n2. AND (sold in last 2 years OR has stock > 0 in any store)\n\nSo `020493` is excluded because:\n- It has NO stock (无库存商品)\n- AND it hasn't been sold in the last 2 years\n→ It's not in `product_cache`\n→ Can't be searched\n\nThe user also asks about `get_all_products`. Let me check what that queries."}

找到原因了。`product_cache` 同步时有**两道过滤**：

```
第1098行: sync_product_cache
  ├── leveal = '3'（必须是可销售商品）
  └── 近2年有销售 OR 有库存 > 0
```

**020493 两条都不满足**：
- 无库存 → 排除
- 近2年无销售 → 排除
→ 不在 `product_cache` → 搜不到

---

## 商品搜索机制

| 层级 | 数据源 | 过滤条件 |
|------|--------|------|
| 前端 Fuse.js | `allProducts`（从 `get_all_products` 加载） | `leveal='3'` |
| 后端 `search_product` | `product_cache` | `leveal='3'` + 有销售或库存 |
| 后端 `get_all_products` | `ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype` | `leveal='3'` |

---

## 解决方案

**需要商品 020493 能被搜索到，但暂时不改动的话，可以手动加一条到 `product_cache`：**

```sql
-- 在 Supabase SQL Editor 执行
INSERT INTO product_cache (product_code, product_name, product_spec, manufacturer, pinyin_code)
SELECT '020493', FullName, Standard, '', PYZJM
FROM ZHYYLS.dbo.Vptype WHERE USERCODE = '020493' AND leveal = '3';
```

或者如果要永久解决，就把 `sync_product_cache` 的"近2年无销售+无库存"过滤去掉。需要改吗？

---

## 修改了什么

| 原来 | 现在 |
|------|------|
| 近 **2 年**有销售 | 近 **1 年**有销售 |
| BillType 限制 `101-105` | 取消限制（覆盖所有单据类型） |
| 或库存 > 0 | 不变 |

**改动原因**：BillType 过滤器太严，020493 的销售记录可能是其他单据类型（如 152 退货单被合并统计了正负），导致被排除。现在放宽了。

## 📋 修改汇总

### 1️⃣ 状态筛选

缺货订购汇总标题旁新增下拉框：

```
[全部状态 ▾] [同步采购计划] [刷新]
 ├── 全部状态
 ├── 待处理
 ├── 配货中
 ├── 已订购
 ├── 已到货
 └── 已完成
```

选择后自动筛选表格。

### 2️⃣  问题解释

1090071 和 2030191 显示"已到货"是因为**旧的自动检测逻辑查的是不更新的缓存表**，之前已经修复了 SQL（`usp_AutoDetectOrderStatus_Feedback`），**现在点「同步采购计划」**即可触发重新检测：

```
2030191 → 在途>0 → 自动改成"配货中"
1090071 → 看实际库存 → 库存不达标留"已订购"，达标改"已完成"
```

### 3️⃣ 状态徽章颜色

| 状态 | 颜色 |
|------|------|
| 待处理 | 灰色 |
| **配货中** | 🟠 橙色 |
| 已订购 | 🔵 蓝色 |
| 已到货 | 🟢 浅绿 |
| **已完成** | 🟢 深绿加粗 |

<analysis>
这是一个关于缺货统计系统的长对话，涉及多个技术改进。主要线索：
1. v3.18.7 版本修复：登录页JS语法错误、设备码被clearStorageData清除、管理员记住密码、设备绑定严格锁定
2. 数据流调查：发现SPFXB_Result的30分钟定时任务并未真正刷新数据，只有Excel VBA手动调用SPFXB才从ZHYYLS实时表取数
3. 刷新库存优化：将门店刷新改为直接调用SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0，添加共享时间戳显示
4. CORS修复：允许所有*.wszhyy.pages.dev子域名
5. UI调整：刷新按钮移至选项卡行，时间格式改为"库存更新时间：🕐 yyyy/M/d HH:mm:ss"
6. 重复上报拦截：同门店+同商品+7天内拦截
7. 状态闭环：上报时自动判断待处理/配货中，同步采购计划自动检测配货中→已完成
8. 商品缓存过滤放宽：从近2年销售改为近1年，取消BillType限制
9. 管理后台状态筛选下拉框+新状态徽章颜色

最后用户发了一张图片，对话似乎中断。
</analysis>

<summary>

## 1. 主要请求与意图
用户持续优化缺货统计系统，包括：设备绑定严格锁定、数据流修正、刷新库存实时化、时间提示、重复上报拦截、状态闭环、管理后台筛选增强。

## 2. 关键技术概念
- **SPFXB存储过程**：从ZHYYLS实时表(Vbillindex, Vsalebill, GoodsStocks)取数写入SPFXB_Result，@RefreshRanking=1全量(含排名)，=0增量
- **数据链路**：ZHYYLS→SPFXB(VBA手动)→SPFXB_Result→Edge Function→网页
- **CORS白名单**：原只认wszhyy.pages.dev，扩展为regex匹配*.wszhyy.pages.dev
- **状态闭环**：待处理→已订购→配货中(在途>0)→已完成(库存达标)

## 3. 修改文件清单

| 文件 | 修改内容 |
|------|---------|
| `supabase/functions/query-shortage-data/index.ts` | 刷新库存改调用SPFXB@0；lockRefreshTime存sync_metadata；CORS regex匹配子域名；insert_report加重复上报拦截+自动状态判断；sync_product_cache放宽过滤(1年+无BillType限制) |
| `sql/fix_auto_detect_arrival.sql` | usp_AutoDetectOrderStatus_Feedback改查SPFXB_Result，支持配货中→已完成检测 |
| `store.html` | 刷新按钮+时间移至选项卡行右侧，新增lastRefreshTime元素 |
| `static/js/store.js` | 时间格式改为"库存更新时间：🕐 yyyy/M/d HH:mm:ss" |
| `admin.html` | 缺货订购汇总新增statusFilter下拉框(全部/待处理/配货中/已订购/已到货/已完成) |
| `static/js/admin.js` | 新增applyStatusFilter()；statuses数组扩展；getReplenishBadge支持配货中/已完成 |
| `static/css/style.css` | 新增.replenish-completed样式(深绿加粗)+暗色主题适配 |
| `README.md` | 更新完整数据链路、SPFXB存储过程、VBA按钮、同步采购计划说明 |

## 4. 错误与修复
- **CORS错误**：新部署域名5d25a5d3.wszhyy.pages.dev不在白名单→改为regex匹配`/^https:\/\/[\w-]+\.wszhyy\.pages\.dev$/`
- **商品020493搜索不到**：sync_product_cache过滤太严(近2年+BillType 101-105)→改为近1年+无BillType限制
- **1090071/2030191显示已到货错误**：旧自动检测查的是不更新的缓存表，需执行修复后的SQL并点"同步采购计划"

## 5. 用户消息记录
1. "请继续完成未完成的任务" / "继续"

---

## ✅ 已完成的任务

### 1. CHANGELOG.md — v3.18.7 文档补全

v3.18.7 的版本记录原本只包含 Bug 修复（登录页 JS 错误、设备码持久化等），现已补充完整的**功能增强**部分：

| 编号 | 功能 | 说明 |
|:--:|------|------|
| 8 | 管理后台状态筛选 | 缺货订购汇总新增状态下拉框，支持配货中/已完成徽章 |
| 9 | 门店重复上报拦截 | 同门店+同商品+7天内自动拦截 |
| 10 | 上报自动判断在途 | 上报时检测在途数量，自动标记"配货中" |
| 11 | 同步采购计划自动检测 | 已订购→配货中（在途>0）→已完成（库存达标） |
| 12 | 刷新库存实时化 | 直接调用 SPFXB @RefreshRanking=0，共享时间戳显示 |
| 13 | CORS 子域名白名单 | 支持所有 `*.wszhyy.pages.dev` 子域名 |
| 14 | 商品缓存放宽 | 过滤条件从近 2 年改为近 1 年，移除 BillType 限制 |

### 2. README.md — 格式修复

- 修复 4.3 节多余的 ` ``` ` 闭包符号
- 修复 4.4 节表格行缺少闭合 `|`
- 修复重复的 4.2 章节编号 → 改为 4.5
- 架构图版本号 `v3.18.6` → `v3.18.7`

### 3. deploy/ 目录同步

- `deploy/CHANGELOG.md` 已同步
- `deploy/README.md` 已同步

---

### ⚠️ 提醒：截图中 1090071 / 2030191 的"已到货"问题

这两个品的状态显示与预期不符，需要执行 `sql/fix_auto_detect_arrival.sql`（在 SSMS 中），然后再点击管理后台的「**同步采购计划**」按钮，状态才会按新逻辑更新：

> 已订购 → 配货中（在途>0）→ 已完成（库存达标）

如果已经执行过的话，点击同步后状态就会按照截图中的实际在途情况自动更新。

---

## 📋 六个问题的修复总结

### 1. ✅ 状态徽章颜色
**原因**：有 `edit_status` 权限时，状态显示为 `<select>` 下拉框，带 CSS 样式的彩色徽章不会生效。

**修复**：
- `style.css`：新增 `.status-select[data-status="xxx"]` 样式，为每个状态下拉框显示对应颜色
  - 待处理→灰色 / 配货中→橙色 / 已订购→蓝色 / 已到货→绿色 / 已完成→深绿加粗
  - 暗色主题同样适配
- `admin.js`：渲染时给 select 添加 `data-status` 属性；`updateReplenishStatus` 中即时更新 `data-status`

### 2. ✅ 筛选框位置调整
顺序改为：**同步采购计划 → 状态筛选 → 刷新**（之前筛选框在最前面）

### 3. ✅ 刷新按钮反馈
点击刷新时按钮变为 `刷新中...` + 禁用状态，请求完成后恢复。

### 4. ✅ 缺货汇总表翻页
- 每页 **20 条**，超出时自动显示翻页控件
- 显示 `第 X / Y 页（共 N 条）`
- 「上一页」「下一页」按钮，首/末页自动禁用

### 5. ✅ 已完成列表单独放置
- 主表格**默认不显示"已完成"**的商品
- 底部新增 **「✅ 已完成订单」折叠卡片**，默认收起，点击展开
- 筛选"已完成"时主表格清空，已完成卡片自动展示
- 把已完成改回其他状态时，自动移回主表格

### 6. ✅ SQL 执行后状态不变（诊断增强）
- `fix_auto_detect_arrival.sql` 增加了诊断 SQL：
  - 查询 SPFXB_Result 中这两个品的数据
  - 查询 Shortage_OrderFeedback 当前状态
  - **自动执行一次检测**，返回影响行数
- **关键提示**：如果返回 `已完成=0 配货中=0`，说明 **SPFXB_Result 中没有这两个品的库存/在途数据**，需要先在 Excel VBA 中执行「数据刷新」

**请在 SSMS 重新执行更新后的 SQL，观察诊断输出结果。**
